recipes.title: 3 Ingredient Crockpot Chicken Tacos
ingredients: 6 boneless skinless chicken breasts (frozen or thawed)
instructions: Spray slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray.
Place chicken breasts at the bottom of the slow cooker.
Pour salsa over the chicken and sprinkle taco seasoning on top.
Cook on high for 4 to 6 hours or on low for 6 to 8 hours.
When chicken is done, shred with two forks directly in the slow cooker and stir to coat in sauce.
Serve shredded chicken in taco shells or flour tortillas with desired toppings.
recipes.searchText: 3 ingredient crockpot chicken tacos 6 boneless skinless chicken breasts (frozen or thawed) 1 jar (16 oz) salsa 1 packet (1.25 oz) taco seasoning 12 taco shells or flour tortillas 1 cup guacamole 2 cups shredded lettuce 1 1/2 cups shredded cheddar cheese 2 diced tomatoes 1 can (6 oz) sliced olives 1 cup sour cream spray slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray. place chicken breasts at the bottom of the slow cooker. pour salsa over the chicken and sprinkle taco seasoning on top. cook on high for 4 to 6 hours or on low for 6 to 8 hours. when chicken is done, shred with two forks directly in the slow cooker and stir to coat in sauce. serve shredded chicken in taco shells or flour tortillas with desired toppings.

recipes.title: Air Fryer Flautas
instructions: Combine the shredded chicken, salsa, shredded cheese, and softened cream cheese in a large bowl. Stir well until ingredients are thoroughly incorporated.
Heat the air fryer to 380 degrees F.
Place 1 to 2 tablespoons of the filling across the center of each tortilla. Roll from the bottom edge upward until completely sealed, then place seam-side down. Repeat for all eight tortillas.
Spray the air fryer basket with cooking oil. Arrange flautas in a single layer without crowding, seam-side down. Work in batches if necessary. Spray the tops with cooking oil.
Air fry for 8 to 10 minutes or until tortillas are golden brown and crispy.
Transfer to a serving plate and repeat with remaining batches. Serve topped with salsa, sour cream, hot sauce, or queso as desired.
recipes.searchText: air fryer flautas 1 cup cooked, shredded chicken 1/2 cup salsa (any type or flavor) 1/2 cup shredded mexican-blend cheese 1/4 cup cream cheese, softened 8 (10-inch) flour tortillas (burrito-size) cooking oil spray combine the shredded chicken, salsa, shredded cheese, and softened cream cheese in a large bowl. stir well until ingredients are thoroughly incorporated. heat the air fryer to 380 degrees f. place 1 to 2 tablespoons of the filling across the center of each tortilla. roll from the bottom edge upward until completely sealed, then place seam-side down. repeat for all eight tortillas. spray the air fryer basket with cooking oil. arrange flautas in a single layer without crowding, seam-side down. work in batches if necessary. spray the tops with cooking oil. air fry for 8 to 10 minutes or until tortillas are golden brown and crispy. transfer to a serving plate and repeat with remaining batches. serve topped with salsa, sour cream, hot sauce, or queso as desired.

recipes.title: Asian Broccoli Salad with Peanut Sauce

items: 1 large head broccoli, cut into small florets

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add broccoli florets and blanch for 1-2 minutes until bright green and crisp-tender. Drain and rinse with cold water to stop cooking.
Whisk together peanut butter, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and sesame oil until smooth. Add hot water as needed to reach desired consistency.
In a large bowl, combine broccoli, edamame, green onions, and peanuts. Toss with peanut sauce.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve.
recipes.searchText: asian broccoli salad with peanut sauce 1 large head broccoli, cut into small florets 1 cup shelled cooked edamame 1/2 cup thinly sliced green onions 1/2 cup peanuts sesame seeds for garnish 1/4 cup natural peanut butter 1 tablespoon soy sauce 1 tablespoon honey or agave nectar 1 tablespoon rice vinegar 1/8 teaspoon toasted sesame oil 1-2 tablespoons hot water (to thin) bring a large pot of water to a boil. add broccoli florets and blanch for 1-2 minutes until bright green and crisp-tender. drain and rinse with cold water to stop cooking. whisk together peanut butter, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, and sesame oil until smooth. add hot water as needed to reach desired consistency. in a large bowl, combine broccoli, edamame, green onions, and peanuts. toss with peanut sauce. garnish with sesame seeds and serve.

recipes.title: Impossibly Easy Bacon Cheeseburger Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Spray a 9-inch glass pie plate with cooking spray.
In a 10-inch skillet, cook bacon over medium-high heat 5 to 7 minutes, turning once, until crisp. Drain on paper towels. Crumble bacon and set aside.
In the same skillet, cook beef, pepper, and onion over medium-high heat 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until beef is thoroughly cooked. Drain. Stir in ketchup.
Transfer beef mixture to pie plate. Top with cheese and crumbled bacon.
In a medium bowl, stir Bisquick, milk, and eggs with a whisk until blended. Pour into pie plate over the beef mixture.
Bake 20 to 25 minutes or until a knife inserted in center comes out clean. Serve with additional ketchup if desired.
recipes.searchText: impossibly easy bacon cheeseburger pie 6 slices bacon 1 lb lean ground beef (at least 80%) 1/4 teaspoon pepper 1 large onion, chopped (about 1 cup) 1/4 cup ketchup 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese (4 oz) 1/2 cup bisquick mix 1 cup milk 2 eggs preheat oven to 400 degrees f. spray a 9-inch glass pie plate with cooking spray. in a 10-inch skillet, cook bacon over medium-high heat 5 to 7 minutes, turning once, until crisp. drain on paper towels. crumble bacon and set aside. in the same skillet, cook beef, pepper, and onion over medium-high heat 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until beef is thoroughly cooked. drain. stir in ketchup. transfer beef mixture to pie plate. top with cheese and crumbled bacon. in a medium bowl, stir bisquick, milk, and eggs with a whisk until blended. pour into pie plate over the beef mixture. bake 20 to 25 minutes or until a knife inserted in center comes out clean. serve with additional ketchup if desired.

recipes.title: Juicy Baked Chicken Breast
ingredients: 2 lb boneless skinless chicken breast (about 4 medium pieces)
1 tablespoon olive oil, avocado oil, or melted butter

steps: Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Pound chicken breasts between plastic wrap to an even thickness (about 3/4 inch).
Pat chicken dry with paper towels, then brush all sides with oil or butter.
Combine salt, garlic powder, paprika, and black pepper in a small bowl. Sprinkle mixture over both sides of chicken.
Arrange chicken on the baking sheet with space between pieces.
Bake at 400°F for 18-22 minutes (adjust based on thickness) until internal temperature reaches 165°F.
Rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.

recipes.searchText: juicy baked chicken breast 2 lb boneless skinless chicken breast (about 4 medium pieces) 1 1/2 tsp fine sea salt 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tsp paprika 1 tsp freshly ground black pepper 1 tablespoon olive oil, avocado oil, or melted butter preheat oven to 400°f. line a baking sheet with parchment paper. pound chicken breasts between plastic wrap to an even thickness (about 3/4 inch). pat chicken dry with paper towels, then brush all sides with oil or butter. combine salt, garlic powder, paprika, and black pepper in a small bowl. sprinkle mixture over both sides of chicken. arrange chicken on the baking sheet with space between pieces. bake at 400°f for 18-22 minutes (adjust based on thickness) until internal temperature reaches 165°f. rest for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.

recipes.title: Baked Herb Catfish
instructions: Combine parsley, salt, paprika, thyme, oregano, basil, and pepper in a small bowl. Sprinkle seasoning mixture over fillets on both sides.
Place catfish in a greased 13x9 inch baking dish. Whisk together lemon juice, butter, and garlic. Drizzle over fillets.
Bake uncovered at 350 degrees F for 15-20 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.
recipes.searchText: baked herb catfish 2 tablespoons minced fresh parsley 1 teaspoon salt 3/4 teaspoon paprika 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano 1/2 teaspoon dried basil 1/2 teaspoon pepper 4 catfish fillets (6 ounces each) 2 tablespoons lemon juice 1 tablespoon butter, melted 1 garlic clove, minced combine parsley, salt, paprika, thyme, oregano, basil, and pepper in a small bowl. sprinkle seasoning mixture over fillets on both sides. place catfish in a greased 13x9 inch baking dish. whisk together lemon juice, butter, and garlic. drizzle over fillets. bake uncovered at 350 degrees f for 15-20 minutes or until fish flakes easily with a fork.

recipes.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until cooked through but firm to the bite, about 8 minutes.
At the same time, melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add flour, salt, and pepper and stir until smooth, about 5 minutes.
Pour in milk slowly while stirring continuously. Continue to cook and stir until mixture is smooth and bubbling, about 5 minutes, making sure the milk doesn't burn.
Add cheddar cheese and stir until melted, 2 to 4 minutes.
Drain macaroni and fold into cheese sauce until coated.
Serve hot.
recipes.searchText: baked macaroni and cheese 1 (8 oz) box elbow macaroni 1/4 cup butter 1/4 cup all-purpose flour 1/2 teaspoon salt ground black pepper to taste 2 cups milk 2 cups shredded cheddar cheese bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. cook elbow macaroni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until cooked through but firm to the bite, about 8 minutes. at the same time, melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. add flour, salt, and pepper and stir until smooth, about 5 minutes. pour in milk slowly while stirring continuously. continue to cook and stir until mixture is smooth and bubbling, about 5 minutes, making sure the milk doesn't burn. add cheddar cheese and stir until melted, 2 to 4 minutes. drain macaroni and fold into cheese sauce until coated. serve hot.

recipes.title: Baked Rosemary Chicken with Apples
ingredients: 1 large Honeycrisp, Fuji, or Gala apple, cored and cut into 1/2-inch wedges
instructions: Combine vinegar, honey mustard, olive oil, garlic, salt, and rosemary in a resealable plastic bag. Add chicken, seal, and coat thoroughly with marinade. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
Transfer chicken and marinade to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Distribute apple and shallot pieces between the chicken thighs and pour white wine over everything.
Bake for 1 1/2 hours until chicken is tender and golden brown.
Transfer chicken to a serving dish and pour pan juices over top.
recipes.searchText: baked rosemary chicken with apples 1/4 cup cider vinegar 2 tablespoons honey mustard 2 tablespoons olive oil 4 cloves garlic, minced 1 teaspoon kosher salt 1 tablespoon finely chopped fresh rosemary 2 1/2 pounds boneless, skinless chicken thighs 1 large honeycrisp, fuji, or gala apple, cored and cut into 1/2-inch wedges 2 large shallots, quartered 1/4 cup white wine combine vinegar, honey mustard, olive oil, garlic, salt, and rosemary in a resealable plastic bag. add chicken, seal, and coat thoroughly with marinade. refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight. preheat oven to 375 degrees f. transfer chicken and marinade to a 9x13-inch baking dish. distribute apple and shallot pieces between the chicken thighs and pour white wine over everything. bake for 1 1/2 hours until chicken is tender and golden brown. transfer chicken to a serving dish and pour pan juices over top.

recipes.title: Baked Tilapia with Dill Sauce
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
Pat tilapia fillets dry with a paper towel, then drizzle with olive oil and rub evenly.
Sprinkle salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika on both sides of fillets.
Place seasoned fillets in a single layer in a baking dish and arrange lemon slices on top.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until fish flakes easily with a fork.

Meanwhile, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, fresh dill, lemon juice, and garlic powder in a bowl. Mix until well combined and season with salt and pepper to taste. Refrigerate for at least 15 minutes before serving.
Plate tilapia and drizzle with chilled dill sauce.
recipes.searchText: baked tilapia with dill sauce 4 tilapia fillets 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon black pepper 1 teaspoon garlic powder 1 teaspoon paprika 1 lemon, sliced 1/2 cup mayonnaise 1/2 cup sour cream 2 tablespoons fresh dill, chopped 1 tablespoon lemon juice 1 teaspoon garlic powder salt and pepper to taste preheat oven to 400 degrees f. pat tilapia fillets dry with a paper towel, then drizzle with olive oil and rub evenly. sprinkle salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika on both sides of fillets. place seasoned fillets in a single layer in a baking dish and arrange lemon slices on top. bake for 15-20 minutes until fish flakes easily with a fork. meanwhile, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, fresh dill, lemon juice, and garlic powder in a bowl. mix until well combined and season with salt and pepper to taste. refrigerate for at least 15 minutes before serving. plate tilapia and drizzle with chilled dill sauce.

recipes.title: Perfect Beef Tenderloin Roast

items: 2 tablespoons fresh herbs (rosemary and thyme), finely chopped
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Remove beef from refrigerator 2 hours before cooking to bring to room temperature. Trim excess fat and silver skin with a sharp knife.
Tie the roast with butcher's twine at regular intervals to maintain an even shape.
Pat beef dry with paper towels and season generously with salt and pepper on all sides.
Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
Combine softened butter, minced garlic, chopped fresh herbs, salt, and pepper in a small bowl to make the herb butter.
Heat an oven-safe skillet over high heat with oil or clarified butter. Sear beef for 2 to 3 minutes per side until a brown crust forms, using tongs to turn.
Remove from pan and rub generously with garlic herb butter on all sides.
Place on a wire rack set over a baking sheet. Roast at 425 degrees F for 20 to 25 minutes until internal temperature reaches desired doneness (125 degrees F for rare, 135 degrees F for medium-rare).
Rest 10 to 15 minutes tented with foil before slicing.
Slice and serve with pan juices, creamy horseradish, and fresh herbs.
recipes.searchText: perfect beef tenderloin roast 1/4 cup unsalted butter (1/2 stick), softened 3 to 4 cloves garlic, minced 2 tablespoons fresh herbs (rosemary and thyme), finely chopped salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste 4 to 5 pounds beef tenderloin roast 2 tablespoons olive oil (or clarified butter) salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste creamy horseradish for serving fresh herbs for garnish remove beef from refrigerator 2 hours before cooking to bring to room temperature. trim excess fat and silver skin with a sharp knife. tie the roast with butcher's twine at regular intervals to maintain an even shape. pat beef dry with paper towels and season generously with salt and pepper on all sides. preheat oven to 425 degrees f. combine softened butter, minced garlic, chopped fresh herbs, salt, and pepper in a small bowl to make the herb butter. heat an oven-safe skillet over high heat with oil or clarified butter. sear beef for 2 to 3 minutes per side until a brown crust forms, using tongs to turn. remove from pan and rub generously with garlic herb butter on all sides. place on a wire rack set over a baking sheet. roast at 425 degrees f for 20 to 25 minutes until internal temperature reaches desired doneness (125 degrees f for rare, 135 degrees f for medium-rare). rest 10 to 15 minutes tented with foil before slicing. slice and serve with pan juices, creamy horseradish, and fresh herbs.

recipes.title: Beer Batter Fish

items: 700g (1.4 lb) white fish fillets (cod, snapper, haddock, or tilapia), skinless and boneless
4-5 cups peanut oil (or vegetable, canola, or cottonseed oil)

instructions: Pat fish dry with paper towels. Cut into 7x3 cm batons or larger fillets. For thick fillets, cut horizontally in half.
Place 1/4 cup rice flour in a shallow bowl for dusting.
Heat 6 cm of oil in a large heavy pot to 190°C (375°F).
Salt 3-4 fish pieces and coat in rice flour, shaking off excess. Can rest up to 10 minutes.
Make the batter: whisk flour, rice flour, baking powder, and salt together. Add cold beer and whisk until just combined. Do not overmix -- lumps are fine.
Dunk each floured fish piece into batter and let excess drip off briefly.
Carefully lower fish into hot oil one piece at a time. Fry for 3 minutes total, flipping after about 2 minutes, until deep golden.
Remove to paper towels to drain. Repeat with remaining fish.
Serve hot with tartar sauce and lemon wedges.
recipes.searchText: beer batter fish 700g (1.4 lb) white fish fillets (cod, snapper, haddock, or tilapia), skinless and boneless 1/4 cup rice flour (for dusting) salt 3/4 cup plain/all-purpose flour 1/4 cup rice flour 1 1/4 teaspoons baking powder 1/4 teaspoon salt 1 cup very cold beer 4-5 cups peanut oil (or vegetable, canola, or cottonseed oil) tartar sauce lemon wedges pat fish dry with paper towels. cut into 7x3 cm batons or larger fillets. for thick fillets, cut horizontally in half. place 1/4 cup rice flour in a shallow bowl for dusting. heat 6 cm of oil in a large heavy pot to 190°c (375°f). salt 3-4 fish pieces and coat in rice flour, shaking off excess. can rest up to 10 minutes. make the batter: whisk flour, rice flour, baking powder, and salt together. add cold beer and whisk until just combined. do not overmix -- lumps are fine. dunk each floured fish piece into batter and let excess drip off briefly. carefully lower fish into hot oil one piece at a time. fry for 3 minutes total, flipping after about 2 minutes, until deep golden. remove to paper towels to drain. repeat with remaining fish. serve hot with tartar sauce and lemon wedges.

recipes.title: Best Baked Pork Tenderloin
ingredients: 1 1/2 lbs pork tenderloin (one or two tenderloins)
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F and lightly grease a large baking/casserole dish.
Pierce tenderloins all over with a fork.
Rub oil onto all sides of the meat.

Whisk together Italian seasoning, garlic powder, cumin, salt, chili powder, smoked paprika (if using), and black pepper. Sprinkle mixture over tenderloin(s), patting it onto the surface of the meat on all sides.
Bake in the preheated oven until cooked through, approximately 25-35 minutes depending on thickness.
recipes.searchText: best baked pork tenderloin 1 1/2 lbs pork tenderloin (one or two tenderloins) 1 tablespoon oil 1 teaspoon italian seasoning 1 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon cumin 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon chili powder 1/2 teaspoon smoked paprika (optional) 1/4 teaspoon black pepper preheat oven to 400 degrees f and lightly grease a large baking/casserole dish. pierce tenderloins all over with a fork. rub oil onto all sides of the meat. whisk together italian seasoning, garlic powder, cumin, salt, chili powder, smoked paprika (if using), and black pepper. sprinkle mixture over tenderloin(s), patting it onto the surface of the meat on all sides. bake in the preheated oven until cooked through, approximately 25-35 minutes depending on thickness.

recipes.title: Best Ever Meatloaf
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Coat a 5x9 loaf pan with cooking spray. Finely chop the onion, crush the crackers, and beat the egg.
In a large bowl, combine ground beef, onion, crushed crackers, beaten egg, milk, 1/2 cup ketchup, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Mix with hands until combined.
Pour mixture into prepared pan and spread evenly. Place on a rimmed baking sheet and bake for 1 1/2 hours.
In a small bowl, mix together 3/4 cup ketchup, brown sugar, apricot preserves, and Worcestershire sauce.
Spread half the sauce mixture over the meatloaf halfway through baking.
Reserve remaining sauce for dipping or topping. Let meatloaf rest 15 minutes before slicing and serving.
recipes.searchText: best ever meatloaf 2 lbs ground beef 1 cup ritz crackers, crushed 1 egg 1 cup milk 1 1/4 cups ketchup, divided 1/3 cup onion, finely chopped 1 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon ground black pepper 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/4 cup brown sugar 1/4 cup apricot preserves 1 tablespoon worcestershire sauce preheat oven to 350 degrees f. coat a 5x9 loaf pan with cooking spray. finely chop the onion, crush the crackers, and beat the egg. in a large bowl, combine ground beef, onion, crushed crackers, beaten egg, milk, 1/2 cup ketchup, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. mix with hands until combined. pour mixture into prepared pan and spread evenly. place on a rimmed baking sheet and bake for 1 1/2 hours. in a small bowl, mix together 3/4 cup ketchup, brown sugar, apricot preserves, and worcestershire sauce. spread half the sauce mixture over the meatloaf halfway through baking. reserve remaining sauce for dipping or topping. let meatloaf rest 15 minutes before slicing and serving.

recipes.title: Black Bean and Corn Quesadillas
ingredients: 1 (15 oz) can black beans, drained and rinsed
1 heaping cup corn (canned or frozen, thawed)
2 cups shredded cheese (Monterey Jack, Colby Jack, or cheddar)
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Saute onion and bell pepper for 1-2 minutes.
Add garlic and cook 30 seconds. Mix in black beans, corn, salsa, brown sugar, cumin, and chili powder.
Reduce heat and adjust seasonings to taste.
Heat another skillet. Place one tortilla inside and sprinkle cheese, then add a heaping scoop of filling spread evenly.
Top with more cheese and place another tortilla on top. Cook until the bottom tortilla turns golden.
Flip carefully using a large spatula. Cook until cheese melts and bottom is golden brown.
Serve with sour cream and salsa.
recipes.searchText: black bean and corn quesadillas 1 teaspoon olive oil 1 clove garlic, minced 1/4 small onion, chopped 1/4 bell pepper (any color), chopped 1 (15 oz) can black beans, drained and rinsed 1 heaping cup corn (canned or frozen, thawed) 1/4 cup salsa 1 teaspoon light brown sugar 1/2 teaspoon cumin 1/2 teaspoon chili powder 2 cups shredded cheese (monterey jack, colby jack, or cheddar) 4 large flour tortillas sour cream, for serving heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. saute onion and bell pepper for 1-2 minutes. add garlic and cook 30 seconds. mix in black beans, corn, salsa, brown sugar, cumin, and chili powder. reduce heat and adjust seasonings to taste. heat another skillet. place one tortilla inside and sprinkle cheese, then add a heaping scoop of filling spread evenly. top with more cheese and place another tortilla on top. cook until the bottom tortilla turns golden. flip carefully using a large spatula. cook until cheese melts and bottom is golden brown. serve with sour cream and salsa.

recipes.title: Black Bean Quinoa Salad
instructions: Cook quinoa with 2 cups of broth according to package directions. Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes.
While quinoa cooks, combine lime juice, olive oil, minced shallot, honey, sea salt, and black pepper in a large bowl. Whisk until emulsified.
Drain and rinse black beans. Chop cilantro and crumble cotija cheese.
Fluff cooked quinoa with a fork and add to the bowl with vinaigrette. Combine with beans, cilantro, and cheese; toss until incorporated.
Refrigerate for at least one hour before serving.
recipes.searchText: black bean quinoa salad 1/4 cup lime juice (about 1 lime) 1/4 cup plus 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 shallot (about 3 tablespoons minced) 1 tablespoon honey 1/2 teaspoon sea salt 1/8 teaspoon black pepper 1 cup uncooked quinoa 2 cups vegetable broth (or water) 2 (15 oz) cans black beans 1/2 cup sliced green onion 1 cup chopped cilantro 1 cup crumbled cotija cheese cook quinoa with 2 cups of broth according to package directions. remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes. while quinoa cooks, combine lime juice, olive oil, minced shallot, honey, sea salt, and black pepper in a large bowl. whisk until emulsified. drain and rinse black beans. chop cilantro and crumble cotija cheese. fluff cooked quinoa with a fork and add to the bowl with vinaigrette. combine with beans, cilantro, and cheese; toss until incorporated. refrigerate for at least one hour before serving.

recipes.title: Black Bean and Spinach Enchiladas

items: 1 (15 oz) can black beans, rinsed and drained
1 1/2 cups sweet corn (canned or frozen and thawed)

instructions: Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add tomato paste, flour, cumin, garlic powder, onion powder, and chili powder. Cook 1 minute while whisking.
Gradually whisk in vegetable broth and bring to a light boil. Reduce to a simmer and cook until slightly thickened, about 8 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
Saute spinach in a pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes until lightly wilted.
In a large bowl, combine black beans, 3/4 cup cheese, wilted spinach, corn, green onions, cilantro, and cumin.
Pour a small amount of sauce into a 9x13 inch baking dish to coat the bottom.
Fill tortillas generously with mixture, roll tightly with ends tucked in, and place seam-side down in dish.
Pour remaining sauce over enchiladas, coating evenly. Sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup cheese on top.
Bake for about 20 minutes. Garnish with additional cilantro and green onions before serving.
recipes.searchText: black bean and spinach enchiladas 2 tablespoons olive oil 1/4 cup tomato paste 1/4 cup all-purpose flour 2 teaspoons ground cumin 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 1/4 teaspoon chili powder 3 cups vegetable broth salt and pepper to taste 1 (15 oz) can black beans, rinsed and drained 1 1/2 cups sweet corn (canned or frozen and thawed) 6 oz fresh baby spinach 6 green onions, thinly sliced 1/3 cup cilantro, chopped 2 teaspoons ground cumin 1 cup shredded cheese 8 large flour tortillas heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. add tomato paste, flour, cumin, garlic powder, onion powder, and chili powder. cook 1 minute while whisking. gradually whisk in vegetable broth and bring to a light boil. reduce to a simmer and cook until slightly thickened, about 8 minutes. season with salt and pepper. preheat oven to 375 degrees f. saute spinach in a pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes until lightly wilted. in a large bowl, combine black beans, 3/4 cup cheese, wilted spinach, corn, green onions, cilantro, and cumin. pour a small amount of sauce into a 9x13 inch baking dish to coat the bottom. fill tortillas generously with mixture, roll tightly with ends tucked in, and place seam-side down in dish. pour remaining sauce over enchiladas, coating evenly. sprinkle remaining 1/4 cup cheese on top. bake for about 20 minutes. garnish with additional cilantro and green onions before serving.

recipes.title: Broccoli Ham Quiche
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees F. Line an unpricked pie crust with a double thickness of heavy-duty aluminum foil. Bake the crust for 8 minutes. Remove the foil and bake 5 minutes longer. Cool the crust on a wire rack while you prepare the filling. Reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees F.
Combine cheeses with flour in a bowl. In another bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, green onion, salt, pepper, thyme, and rosemary.
Stir in ham, broccoli, and cheese mixture. Pour into the prepared crust.
Bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until set. Let stand for at least 10 minutes before slicing.
recipes.searchText: broccoli ham quiche 1 unbaked deep-dish pie crust (9 inches) 1 cup shredded swiss cheese 1 cup shredded part-skim mozzarella cheese 2 tablespoons all-purpose flour 4 large eggs, lightly beaten 1 1/2 cups whole milk 2 tablespoons chopped green onion 1/4 teaspoon salt 1/8 teaspoon pepper 1/8 teaspoon dried thyme 1/8 teaspoon dried rosemary, crushed 1/2 cup diced fully cooked ham 1/2 cup chopped fresh broccoli preheat oven to 450 degrees f. line an unpricked pie crust with a double thickness of heavy-duty aluminum foil. bake the crust for 8 minutes. remove the foil and bake 5 minutes longer. cool the crust on a wire rack while you prepare the filling. reduce oven temperature to 350 degrees f. combine cheeses with flour in a bowl. in another bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, green onion, salt, pepper, thyme, and rosemary. stir in ham, broccoli, and cheese mixture. pour into the prepared crust. bake for 55 to 60 minutes or until set. let stand for at least 10 minutes before slicing.

recipes.title: Brunch Casserole
ingredients: 2 boxes Betty Crocker Seasoned Skillets hash brown potatoes
2 medium red bell peppers, chopped (2 cups)
1 cup shredded pepper Jack cheese (4 oz)
instructions: Spray a 3-quart casserole dish with cooking spray. Cover the hash browns with 10 cups of boiling water in a 4-quart bowl. Let sit for 3 minutes, then drain thoroughly and return to the bowl.

In a 12-inch skillet, cook the sausage over medium heat for 5 minutes. Add bell peppers and cook for 4 additional minutes, stirring often, until the sausage is cooked through and peppers are soft. Drain excess fat. Combine the sausage mixture with potatoes in the bowl; fold in onions and half of each cheese type. Transfer to the baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, salt, pepper, and eggs. Pour this mixture over the sausage-potato base and top with remaining cheese. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
Set oven to 375 degrees F. Uncover the dish and bake for 50 minutes until golden and cheese melts. Allow to rest 10 minutes before plating. Garnish with cilantro if desired.
recipes.searchText: brunch casserole 2 boxes betty crocker seasoned skillets hash brown potatoes 1 1/2 lb bulk spicy pork sausage 2 medium red bell peppers, chopped (2 cups) 8 medium green onions, chopped (1/2 cup) 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese (4 oz) 1 cup shredded pepper jack cheese (4 oz) 2 cups milk 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon pepper 6 eggs chopped fresh cilantro (optional) spray a 3-quart casserole dish with cooking spray. cover the hash browns with 10 cups of boiling water in a 4-quart bowl. let sit for 3 minutes, then drain thoroughly and return to the bowl. in a 12-inch skillet, cook the sausage over medium heat for 5 minutes. add bell peppers and cook for 4 additional minutes, stirring often, until the sausage is cooked through and peppers are soft. drain excess fat. combine the sausage mixture with potatoes in the bowl; fold in onions and half of each cheese type. transfer to the baking dish. in a separate bowl, whisk together milk, salt, pepper, and eggs. pour this mixture over the sausage-potato base and top with remaining cheese. cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight. set oven to 375 degrees f. uncover the dish and bake for 50 minutes until golden and cheese melts. allow to rest 10 minutes before plating. garnish with cilantro if desired.

recipes.title: Cheeseburger Macaroni
ingredients: 1/2 cup finely diced onion (or 1 teaspoon onion powder)
instructions: In a small bowl, combine cornstarch, garlic powder, sugar, salt, paprika, and pepper. Set aside.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Brown the ground beef and onion, breaking it up with a wooden spoon, until no pink remains. Drain any excess fat.
Add milk, broth, and uncooked elbow macaroni to the beef. Stir in the cornstarch and spice mixture. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Once boiling, reduce the heat to a gentle boil, cover and cook for 9-12 minutes or until the pasta is cooked through, stirring occasionally. If needed, add more broth or water.
Remove from heat and stir in cheese until melted. Serve hot.
recipes.searchText: cheeseburger macaroni 1 pound lean ground beef 1/2 cup finely diced onion (or 1 teaspoon onion powder) 2 cups milk 1 1/4 cups chicken broth 1 1/2 cups elbow macaroni 1 tablespoon cornstarch 2 teaspoons garlic powder 1 teaspoon granulated sugar 1 teaspoon salt 1 teaspoon paprika 1/2 teaspoon black pepper 1 3/4 cups shredded sharp cheddar cheese in a small bowl, combine cornstarch, garlic powder, sugar, salt, paprika, and pepper. set aside. heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. brown the ground beef and onion, breaking it up with a wooden spoon, until no pink remains. drain any excess fat. add milk, broth, and uncooked elbow macaroni to the beef. stir in the cornstarch and spice mixture. bring to a boil over medium-high heat. once boiling, reduce the heat to a gentle boil, cover and cook for 9-12 minutes or until the pasta is cooked through, stirring occasionally. if needed, add more broth or water. remove from heat and stir in cheese until melted. serve hot.

recipes.title: Cheesecake Factory Shrimp Scampi (Copycat)

items: 1 1/2 pounds uncooked shrimp (26-30 per pound), peeled and deveined

instructions: Cook angel hair pasta according to package directions. Drain.
Combine flour, Parmesan, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish. Add shrimp and coat, shaking off excess flour.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add shrimp and cook until pink, 3-5 minutes. Remove shrimp and keep warm.
In the same skillet, heat olive oil and add shallot. Cook until tender, 2-3 minutes. Add garlic and cook 1 minute.
Add white wine and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until reduced by half, 3-4 minutes.
Stir in heavy cream and simmer until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Remove garlic cloves.
Add diced tomatoes, basil, salt, pepper, and Parmesan to the sauce.
Serve sauce in shallow dishes, top with pasta and arrange shrimp on top.
recipes.searchText: cheesecake factory shrimp scampi (copycat) 12 ounces uncooked angel hair pasta 1/2 cup all-purpose flour 2 tablespoons grated parmesan cheese 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon pepper 1 1/2 pounds uncooked shrimp (26-30 per pound), peeled and deveined 3 tablespoons butter 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 small shallot, chopped 5 garlic cloves 1 cup dry white wine 2 cups heavy whipping cream 2 plum tomatoes, diced 6 fresh basil leaves, thinly sliced 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon pepper 2 tablespoons grated parmesan cheese cook angel hair pasta according to package directions. drain. combine flour, parmesan, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish. add shrimp and coat, shaking off excess flour. melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. add shrimp and cook until pink, 3-5 minutes. remove shrimp and keep warm. in the same skillet, heat olive oil and add shallot. cook until tender, 2-3 minutes. add garlic and cook 1 minute. add white wine and bring to a boil. reduce heat and simmer until reduced by half, 3-4 minutes. stir in heavy cream and simmer until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. remove garlic cloves. add diced tomatoes, basil, salt, pepper, and parmesan to the sauce. serve sauce in shallow dishes, top with pasta and arrange shrimp on top.

recipes.title: Cheesy Zucchini Crescent Pie
ingredients: 2 cups shredded Muenster or mozzarella cheese (8 oz)
1 can (8 oz) refrigerated Pillsbury crescent rolls (8 count)
instructions: Heat oven to 375 degrees F.

In a 12-inch skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat. Add zucchini and onions and cook 6 to 8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender. Stir in parsley flakes, salt, pepper, garlic powder, basil, and oregano.
In a large bowl, mix eggs and cheese. Add cooked vegetable mixture and stir gently to combine.

Separate crescent dough into 8 triangles. Place in an ungreased 10-inch glass pie plate, 12x8-inch (2-quart) glass baking dish, or 11-inch quiche pan. Press over bottom and up sides to form a crust. Firmly press perforations to seal.
Spread crust with mustard. Pour egg mixture evenly into crust-lined pie plate.
Bake 18 to 22 minutes or until a knife inserted near center comes out clean. If necessary, cover edge of crust with strips of foil during last 10 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning.
Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
recipes.searchText: cheesy zucchini crescent pie 2 tablespoons butter 4 cups thinly sliced zucchini 1 cup chopped onions 2 tablespoons dried parsley flakes 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon pepper 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder 1/4 teaspoon dried basil leaves 1/4 teaspoon dried oregano leaves 2 eggs, well beaten 2 cups shredded muenster or mozzarella cheese (8 oz) 1 can (8 oz) refrigerated pillsbury crescent rolls (8 count) 2 teaspoons yellow mustard heat oven to 375 degrees f. in a 12-inch skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat. add zucchini and onions and cook 6 to 8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender. stir in parsley flakes, salt, pepper, garlic powder, basil, and oregano. in a large bowl, mix eggs and cheese. add cooked vegetable mixture and stir gently to combine. separate crescent dough into 8 triangles. place in an ungreased 10-inch glass pie plate, 12x8-inch (2-quart) glass baking dish, or 11-inch quiche pan. press over bottom and up sides to form a crust. firmly press perforations to seal. spread crust with mustard. pour egg mixture evenly into crust-lined pie plate. bake 18 to 22 minutes or until a knife inserted near center comes out clean. if necessary, cover edge of crust with strips of foil during last 10 minutes of baking to prevent excessive browning. let stand 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Chicken and Dumplings
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Add onion, carrot, and celery. Cook 5-7 minutes until onion becomes translucent. Add thyme and chicken broth.
Whisk flour with a ladle of broth, then pour back into the pot, whisking to remove lumps. Stir in peas and chicken. Season with salt and pepper. Cook 5 minutes.
While broth cooks, prepare dumplings by whisking together all dumpling ingredients. Do not overmix, as this will make them dense.
Drop dumpling batter by the spoonful into the broth. Make portions small since dumplings double in size while cooking.
Cover the pot and simmer 15-20 minutes until dumplings are cooked through. Do not lift the lid, as steam is necessary for fluffy dumplings. Test doneness with a toothpick after 15 minutes.
recipes.searchText: chicken and dumplings 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 large onion, chopped 1 large carrot, chopped 1 stalk celery, chopped 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme 4 cups chicken broth 1/3 cup all-purpose flour 1/2 teaspoon salt (or to taste) 1/2 teaspoon pepper (or to taste) 2 cups shredded roasted chicken 1/2 cup frozen peas 1 cup all-purpose flour 1 large egg, beaten 2 teaspoons baking powder 1/2 teaspoon salt 2 tablespoons chopped chives 1/2 cup buttermilk (use more if needed) heat olive oil in a large dutch oven over medium-high heat. add onion, carrot, and celery. cook 5-7 minutes until onion becomes translucent. add thyme and chicken broth. whisk flour with a ladle of broth, then pour back into the pot, whisking to remove lumps. stir in peas and chicken. season with salt and pepper. cook 5 minutes. while broth cooks, prepare dumplings by whisking together all dumpling ingredients. do not overmix, as this will make them dense. drop dumpling batter by the spoonful into the broth. make portions small since dumplings double in size while cooking. cover the pot and simmer 15-20 minutes until dumplings are cooked through. do not lift the lid, as steam is necessary for fluffy dumplings. test doneness with a toothpick after 15 minutes.

recipes.title: Chicken Pot Pie
ingredients: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, cubed
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
In a saucepan, combine chicken, carrots, peas, and celery. Add water to cover and boil for 15 minutes. Drain and set aside.

In the same saucepan over medium heat, cook onions in butter until soft and translucent. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, and celery seed. Gradually mix in chicken broth and milk. Simmer over medium-low heat until thickened. Remove from heat.
Place the chicken and vegetable mixture in the bottom pie crust. Pour the hot liquid mixture over it.
Top with second crust, seal edges, trim excess dough, and cut several small slits for steam to escape.
Bake for 30-35 minutes until pastry is golden brown and filling is bubbly. Cool for 10 minutes before serving.
recipes.searchText: chicken pot pie 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, cubed 1 cup sliced carrots 1 cup frozen green peas 1/2 cup sliced celery 1/3 cup butter 1/3 cup chopped onion 1/3 cup all-purpose flour 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon black pepper 1/4 teaspoon celery seed 1 3/4 cups chicken broth 2/3 cup milk 2 (9-inch) unbaked pie crusts preheat oven to 425 degrees f. in a saucepan, combine chicken, carrots, peas, and celery. add water to cover and boil for 15 minutes. drain and set aside. in the same saucepan over medium heat, cook onions in butter until soft and translucent. stir in flour, salt, pepper, and celery seed. gradually mix in chicken broth and milk. simmer over medium-low heat until thickened. remove from heat. place the chicken and vegetable mixture in the bottom pie crust. pour the hot liquid mixture over it. top with second crust, seal edges, trim excess dough, and cut several small slits for steam to escape. bake for 30-35 minutes until pastry is golden brown and filling is bubbly. cool for 10 minutes before serving.

recipes.title: Chicken Spaghetti with Rotel Tomatoes
ingredients: 3 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 (10.75 oz) can cream of chicken soup
1 (10 oz) can Rotel diced tomatoes with green chilies (do not drain)
8 ounces Velveeta cheese, cut into cubes
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cook spaghetti according to package instructions for al dente. Drain.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium to medium-high heat. Add chicken pieces, sprinkle with onion powder, and add garlic. Saute for 7-10 minutes until chicken is no longer pink.
Pour in the cream of chicken soup, cubed Velveeta, cubed cream cheese, and Rotel tomatoes. Reduce heat to low and cook while stirring constantly until cheese melts.
Add drained spaghetti and stir into the cheese and chicken mixture until fully coated. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Lightly grease a 2-quart casserole dish and pour in the mixture. Sprinkle cheddar cheese on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted.
recipes.searchText: chicken spaghetti with rotel tomatoes 3 boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces 1 (10.75 oz) can cream of chicken soup 1 (10 oz) can rotel diced tomatoes with green chilies (do not drain) 1 clove garlic, minced 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 1 tablespoon butter 8 ounces velveeta cheese, cut into cubes 2 ounces cream cheese 8 ounces spaghetti 1 cup cheddar cheese, grated salt and pepper to taste preheat oven to 350°f. cook spaghetti according to package instructions for al dente. drain. melt butter in a large skillet over medium to medium-high heat. add chicken pieces, sprinkle with onion powder, and add garlic. saute for 7-10 minutes until chicken is no longer pink. pour in the cream of chicken soup, cubed velveeta, cubed cream cheese, and rotel tomatoes. reduce heat to low and cook while stirring constantly until cheese melts. add drained spaghetti and stir into the cheese and chicken mixture until fully coated. season with salt and pepper to taste. lightly grease a 2-quart casserole dish and pour in the mixture. sprinkle cheddar cheese on top. bake for 25-30 minutes until heated through and cheese is melted.

recipes.title: High Protein Chicken Zucchini Bake
instructions: Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, combine the diced chicken, sliced zucchini, halved cherry tomatoes, and minced garlic.
Drizzle olive oil over the mixture and sprinkle the Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. Toss until everything is evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture into a greased baking dish.
Spread the shredded cheese evenly on top of the chicken and vegetable mixture.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
Let it cool for a few minutes and garnish with fresh basil if desired.
recipes.searchText: high protein chicken zucchini bake 2 large zucchini, thinly sliced 2 chicken breasts, diced 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved 1 cup shredded cheese (mozzarella or cheddar) 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 teaspoon italian seasoning salt and pepper to taste fresh basil for garnish (optional) preheat your oven to 375°f (190°c). in a large bowl, combine the diced chicken, sliced zucchini, halved cherry tomatoes, and minced garlic. drizzle olive oil over the mixture and sprinkle the italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. toss until everything is evenly coated. transfer the mixture into a greased baking dish. spread the shredded cheese evenly on top of the chicken and vegetable mixture. cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes. remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked and the cheese is melted and golden brown. let it cool for a few minutes and garnish with fresh basil if desired.

recipes.title: Chocolate Lasagna
instructions: Crush whole Oreos with cream in a food processor until fine crumbs form. Reserve 3 tablespoons for topping.
Mix crushed Oreos with melted butter. Press mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish. Refrigerate.
Beat cream cheese with vanilla and powdered sugar until smooth. Fold in 8 oz Cool Whip. Spread evenly over crust. Refrigerate.
Beat pudding mix with cold milk until thickened. Spread evenly over cheesecake layer. Refrigerate until set.
Spread remaining 8 oz Cool Whip over pudding layer. Sprinkle with reserved Oreo crumbs.
Cover and chill a minimum of 2 hours before serving.
recipes.searchText: chocolate lasagna 14.3 oz package of oreos 6 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted 12 oz cream cheese, room temperature 1 teaspoon vanilla extract 1/4 cup powdered sugar 8 oz cool whip, refrigerated 2 (3.9 oz) packages instant chocolate pudding 3 1/4 cups cold whole milk 8 oz cool whip, refrigerated crush whole oreos with cream in a food processor until fine crumbs form. reserve 3 tablespoons for topping. mix crushed oreos with melted butter. press mixture into a 9x13-inch baking dish. refrigerate. beat cream cheese with vanilla and powdered sugar until smooth. fold in 8 oz cool whip. spread evenly over crust. refrigerate. beat pudding mix with cold milk until thickened. spread evenly over cheesecake layer. refrigerate until set. spread remaining 8 oz cool whip over pudding layer. sprinkle with reserved oreo crumbs. cover and chill a minimum of 2 hours before serving.

recipes.title: Classic Deviled Eggs
ingredients: Kosher salt and ground black pepper to taste
instructions: Bring water to a boil, reduce heat to low, then use a skimmer to place eggs in water. Increase heat back to high and cook for 14 minutes.
Remove the eggs from the water and place them in an ice water bath to cool.
Once cooled, peel eggs and slice lengthwise. Scoop yolks into a bowl and arrange whites on a serving plate.
Mash yolks with a fork, then combine with mayonnaise, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Use a spoon to add a portion of the filling back into the hole of each egg white. Sprinkle with paprika for garnish.
recipes.searchText: classic deviled eggs 6 large eggs 3 tablespoons mayonnaise 1 teaspoon dijon mustard 1 teaspoon apple cider vinegar kosher salt and ground black pepper to taste paprika for garnish bring water to a boil, reduce heat to low, then use a skimmer to place eggs in water. increase heat back to high and cook for 14 minutes. remove the eggs from the water and place them in an ice water bath to cool. once cooled, peel eggs and slice lengthwise. scoop yolks into a bowl and arrange whites on a serving plate. mash yolks with a fork, then combine with mayonnaise, mustard, vinegar, salt, and pepper until smooth. use a spoon to add a portion of the filling back into the hole of each egg white. sprinkle with paprika for garnish.

recipes.title: Clean Eating Lemon Salmon
ingredients: 1 tablespoon lemon juice (juice of one lemon)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F.
Cut the baby potatoes in half. Microwave potatoes for 2-3 minutes until fork tender.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, and all spices.
Line a baking sheet with foil.
Lay salmon fillet in the middle of the sheet. Add green beans and potatoes to the baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil and spice mixture over the salmon, green beans, and potatoes. Toss the potatoes and green beans for even coating.
Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes, then broil for 3-5 minutes until the salmon is lightly browned.
recipes.searchText: clean eating lemon salmon 1 lb salmon fillet 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 tablespoon lemon juice (juice of one lemon) 1/2 tablespoon honey 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon dried dill 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger 1/2 teaspoon dried parsley 1/2 teaspoon paprika 1/4 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon black pepper 2 cups baby potatoes 2 cups green beans preheat the oven to 425°f. cut the baby potatoes in half. microwave potatoes for 2-3 minutes until fork tender. in a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, honey, and all spices. line a baking sheet with foil. lay salmon fillet in the middle of the sheet. add green beans and potatoes to the baking sheet. drizzle the olive oil and spice mixture over the salmon, green beans, and potatoes. toss the potatoes and green beans for even coating. bake at 425°f for 15 minutes, then broil for 3-5 minutes until the salmon is lightly browned.

recipes.title: Coconut Rice
instructions: Place rice in a large saucepan and add enough cold water to cover. Swirl the rice around, then drain. Repeat until water runs mostly clear.
Add coconut milk, 1 cup water, and salt to the rinsed rice. Stir to combine. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender, about 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let the rice sit, covered, for 5 minutes to steam.
Uncover and fluff with a fork. Serve.
recipes.searchText: coconut rice 1 1/2 cups white jasmine rice 1 (13 oz) can unsweetened coconut milk 1 cup water 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt place rice in a large saucepan and add enough cold water to cover. swirl the rice around, then drain. repeat until water runs mostly clear. add coconut milk, 1 cup water, and salt to the rinsed rice. stir to combine. bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally. reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender, about 15 minutes. turn off the heat and let the rice sit, covered, for 5 minutes to steam. uncover and fluff with a fork. serve.

recipes.title: Cranberry Pinot Noir Meatballs

items: 1 cup Pinot Noir wine (any red wine may be substituted)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. Lightly oil a large shallow baking dish.
Prepare sauce by combining cranberry sauce, brown sugar, wine, and mustard in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Stir to combine and simmer 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, celery, onion, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, garlic salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly using hands. Shape into 1-inch balls and place in a single layer in prepared pan.
Bake 20 minutes, turning once. Drain grease.
Transfer meatballs to a heated chafing dish or slow cooker. Pour prepared sauce over meatballs and keep warm on low heat while serving. Serve with appetizer toothpicks or skewers.
recipes.searchText: cranberry pinot noir meatballs 2 pounds extra-lean ground beef 1 1/2 cups fresh homemade bread crumbs 1/2 cup celery, finely chopped 1/2 cup onion, finely chopped 2 eggs 1 tablespoon worcestershire sauce 2 teaspoons garlic salt 1/4 teaspoon pepper 1 (16-ounce) can whole cranberry sauce 1 cup brown sugar, firmly packed 1 cup pinot noir wine (any red wine may be substituted) 2 teaspoons hot chinese mustard preheat oven to 375 degrees f. lightly oil a large shallow baking dish. prepare sauce by combining cranberry sauce, brown sugar, wine, and mustard in a medium saucepan over medium heat. stir to combine and simmer 5 minutes. remove from heat. combine ground beef, bread crumbs, celery, onion, eggs, worcestershire sauce, garlic salt, and pepper. mix thoroughly using hands. shape into 1-inch balls and place in a single layer in prepared pan. bake 20 minutes, turning once. drain grease. transfer meatballs to a heated chafing dish or slow cooker. pour prepared sauce over meatballs and keep warm on low heat while serving. serve with appetizer toothpicks or skewers.

recipes.title: Creamy Chicken Bake
ingredients: 1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of mushroom soup
1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of chicken soup
1 can (8 oz) mushrooms (stems and pieces), drained
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
Arrange chicken breasts in a 9x13-inch baking pan lightly coated with cooking spray. Season with salt and pepper.
In a mixing bowl, combine both cream soups, sour cream, drained mushrooms, water, onion powder, and chives. Stir until well blended.
Pour the creamy mixture over the chicken breasts. Sprinkle paprika on top.
Bake uncovered for approximately one hour until chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees F and the sauce develops a light brown surface.
Serve alongside rice, egg noodles, or mashed potatoes.
recipes.searchText: creamy chicken bake 4 large chicken breasts 1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of mushroom soup 1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed cream of chicken soup 1 cup sour cream 1 can (8 oz) mushrooms (stems and pieces), drained 1/2 cup water 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 1 teaspoon chives, chopped 1/2 teaspoon paprika 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon pepper preheat oven to 350 degrees f. arrange chicken breasts in a 9x13-inch baking pan lightly coated with cooking spray. season with salt and pepper. in a mixing bowl, combine both cream soups, sour cream, drained mushrooms, water, onion powder, and chives. stir until well blended. pour the creamy mixture over the chicken breasts. sprinkle paprika on top. bake uncovered for approximately one hour until chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees f and the sauce develops a light brown surface. serve alongside rice, egg noodles, or mashed potatoes.

recipes.title: Creamy Steak 'n Onion Dip
ingredients: 2 to 2 1/2 teaspoons 3 Onion Dip Mix (such as Epicure brand)
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, mayonnaise, steak seasoning, and onion dip mix in a bowl.
Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Serve with chips, sliced veggies, or use as a spread on burgers and sandwiches.
recipes.searchText: creamy steak 'n onion dip 3/4 cup greek yogurt (or sour cream) 2 tablespoons mayonnaise 1 1/2 teaspoons montreal steak seasoning 2 to 2 1/2 teaspoons 3 onion dip mix (such as epicure brand) combine greek yogurt, mayonnaise, steak seasoning, and onion dip mix in a bowl. mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated. serve with chips, sliced veggies, or use as a spread on burgers and sandwiches.

recipes.title: Creamy Skillet Tortellini with Sweet Potato and Spinach
ingredients: 1 large sweet potato (about 3/4 to 1 pound), peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
1 (5 oz) bag baby spinach or 1 large bunch spinach, rinsed and torn
instructions: Heat the oil in a heavy-bottomed 10- or 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
Stir in the sweet potato cubes, rosemary, salt, and pepper. Cover the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes, until the sweet potatoes are just starting to soften.
Uncover the skillet and add the broth, scraping the bottom of the pan to dissolve any browned bits.
Add the spinach in handfuls, stirring until it wilts down before adding more.
Stir in the half-and-half, then cover and bring the liquid to a simmer.
Uncover and stir in the tortellini. Cook, stirring frequently, for 10-15 minutes, until the tortellini are plump and cooked through.
recipes.searchText: creamy skillet tortellini with sweet potato and spinach 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 large sweet potato (about 3/4 to 1 pound), peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes 1 tablespoon minced fresh rosemary 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt 1/4 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper 1 cup chicken or vegetable broth 1 (5 oz) bag baby spinach or 1 large bunch spinach, rinsed and torn 1/2 cup half-and-half 1 (12 oz) bag frozen cheese tortellini heat the oil in a heavy-bottomed 10- or 12-inch skillet over medium heat. stir in the sweet potato cubes, rosemary, salt, and pepper. cover the skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes, until the sweet potatoes are just starting to soften. uncover the skillet and add the broth, scraping the bottom of the pan to dissolve any browned bits. add the spinach in handfuls, stirring until it wilts down before adding more. stir in the half-and-half, then cover and bring the liquid to a simmer. uncover and stir in the tortellini. cook, stirring frequently, for 10-15 minutes, until the tortellini are plump and cooked through.

recipes.title: Crockpot BBQ Chicken
instructions: Season chicken breasts lightly with salt and place in the crockpot.
In a mixing bowl, combine BBQ sauce, Italian dressing, brown sugar, and Worcestershire sauce. Stir until well combined.
Pour sauce over chicken. Cover and cook on HIGH for 3-4 hours.
Serve the breasts whole, or shred with two forks. If shredding, re-cover and let cook in sauce for 10-15 more minutes to absorb the flavors.
Serve on buns, over rice, in wraps, on a salad, or topped with coleslaw.
recipes.searchText: crockpot bbq chicken 2 lbs boneless, skinless chicken breasts 1 cup bbq sauce 1/4 cup italian dressing 1/4 cup brown sugar 1 tablespoon worcestershire sauce salt to taste season chicken breasts lightly with salt and place in the crockpot. in a mixing bowl, combine bbq sauce, italian dressing, brown sugar, and worcestershire sauce. stir until well combined. pour sauce over chicken. cover and cook on high for 3-4 hours. serve the breasts whole, or shred with two forks. if shredding, re-cover and let cook in sauce for 10-15 more minutes to absorb the flavors. serve on buns, over rice, in wraps, on a salad, or topped with coleslaw.

recipes.title: Crockpot Chili with Cornbread

items: Cornbread (prepared from your preferred recipe or mix)

instructions: Brown and crumble the ground beef with celery, onion, and garlic in a medium skillet over medium-high heat until the meat is completely browned and vegetables are tender. Drain excess grease.
Pour the beef mixture into a 4-quart or larger crock pot.
Add the diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, kidney beans, beef broth, and refried beans to the crock pot. Break up the refried beans and stir to combine.
Add chili powder, cumin, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix thoroughly.
Cover and cook on LOW for 4-6 hours (the longer, the better).
Serve over cornbread with shredded cheese and sour cream.
recipes.searchText: crockpot chili with cornbread 1 pound ground beef 1 stalk celery, chopped 1 small onion, finely diced 1/2 tablespoon minced garlic 1 (15-ounce) can petite diced tomatoes 1 (15-ounce) can tomato sauce 1 (15-ounce) can dark red kidney beans 1 (15-ounce) can beef broth 1 (15-ounce) can refried beans 1 1/2 tablespoons chili powder 1 teaspoon cumin 1 teaspoon worcestershire sauce cornbread (prepared from your preferred recipe or mix) shredded cheddar cheese sour cream brown and crumble the ground beef with celery, onion, and garlic in a medium skillet over medium-high heat until the meat is completely browned and vegetables are tender. drain excess grease. pour the beef mixture into a 4-quart or larger crock pot. add the diced tomatoes, tomato sauce, kidney beans, beef broth, and refried beans to the crock pot. break up the refried beans and stir to combine. add chili powder, cumin, and worcestershire sauce. mix thoroughly. cover and cook on low for 4-6 hours (the longer, the better). serve over cornbread with shredded cheese and sour cream.

recipes.title: Crockpot Kung Pao Chicken
ingredients: White or brown rice, for serving
instructions: Spray slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray. Place chicken inside.
Pour Kung Pao sauce over chicken.
Cook on low for 5-6 hours or on high for 3-4 hours.
During the last 30 minutes, switch to high (if not already) and add diced bell peppers, drained water chestnuts, and peanuts. Stir to combine.
Remove cooked chicken breasts and cut into bite-sized pieces. Return to slow cooker and stir until fully coated in sauce.
Serve over white or brown rice, garnished with green onions.
recipes.searchText: crockpot kung pao chicken 1 pound boneless skinless chicken breasts 18.75 ounces kung pao sauce (1 bottle) 1 red bell pepper, diced 1 green bell pepper, diced 1 bunch green onions, diced 8 ounces water chestnuts, drained 1/4 cup peanuts (optional) white or brown rice, for serving spray slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray. place chicken inside. pour kung pao sauce over chicken. cook on low for 5-6 hours or on high for 3-4 hours. during the last 30 minutes, switch to high (if not already) and add diced bell peppers, drained water chestnuts, and peanuts. stir to combine. remove cooked chicken breasts and cut into bite-sized pieces. return to slow cooker and stir until fully coated in sauce. serve over white or brown rice, garnished with green onions.

recipes.title: Curried Cauliflower
ingredients: 1 large head cauliflower, cored and cut into florets
instructions: Heat oven to 425 degrees F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, curry powder, cinnamon, salt, and pepper. Add cauliflower, red onion, and almonds; toss to coat.
Spread mixture in a single layer on prepared baking sheet and bake for 25-30 minutes until cauliflower reaches desired tenderness.
Stir in raisins, garnish with fresh cilantro, and serve.
recipes.searchText: curried cauliflower 4 cloves garlic, minced 2 tablespoons lemon juice 1/3 cup olive oil 1 1/2 teaspoons curry powder 1/4 teaspoon ground cinnamon 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon black pepper 1 large head cauliflower, cored and cut into florets 1/2 red onion, peeled and sliced 1/3 cup slivered roasted almonds 1/4 cup golden raisins 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped heat oven to 425 degrees f and line a baking sheet with parchment paper. in a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, curry powder, cinnamon, salt, and pepper. add cauliflower, red onion, and almonds; toss to coat. spread mixture in a single layer on prepared baking sheet and bake for 25-30 minutes until cauliflower reaches desired tenderness. stir in raisins, garnish with fresh cilantro, and serve.

recipes.title: Easiest Lasagna Ever
ingredients: Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. Crumble in ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon.

Pour in crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, basil, and red pepper flakes (if using). Season with salt and pepper. Bring to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a separate bowl, mix together ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, and beaten egg.

Spread a thin layer of meat sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 baking dish. Top with 3 lasagna noodles, half the ricotta mixture, and another meat sauce layer. Repeat with noodles, ricotta mixture, and meat sauce. Top with remaining noodles and mozzarella cheese.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees F for 30-35 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
recipes.searchText: easiest lasagna ever 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 medium onion, diced 1 pound ground beef 1 (28-ounce) can crushed tomatoes 1 (14.5-ounce) can diced tomatoes, undrained 1 (6-ounce) can tomato paste 1 teaspoon dried oregano 1/2 teaspoon dried basil 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes (optional) salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste 1 (15-ounce) container ricotta cheese 1/2 cup grated parmesan cheese 1 large egg, beaten 9 lasagna noodles 1 cup shredded mozzarella cheese heat olive oil in a large pot or dutch oven over medium heat. add diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. crumble in ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon. pour in crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, basil, and red pepper flakes (if using). season with salt and pepper. bring to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. in a separate bowl, mix together ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, and beaten egg. spread a thin layer of meat sauce in the bottom of a 9x13 baking dish. top with 3 lasagna noodles, half the ricotta mixture, and another meat sauce layer. repeat with noodles, ricotta mixture, and meat sauce. top with remaining noodles and mozzarella cheese. bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees f for 30-35 minutes, or until cheese is bubbly and golden brown.

recipes.title: Easy Basic Bacon Quiche
ingredients: 1 cup dairy of choice (milk, half & half, or unsweetened almond milk)
instructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
Whisk eggs and dairy together in a large bowl.
Place pie crust in a 9-inch deep dish pie plate (or use store-bought foil pan).
Add half the cooked bacon and half the shredded cheese to egg mixture and stir well.
Pour mixture into pie crust.
Bake at 375 degrees F for 20 minutes, then add remaining bacon and cheese on top.
Continue baking for 10 additional minutes until golden brown and raised.
Cool for about 10 minutes before serving (the quiche will settle as it cools, which is normal).
Cut and serve.
recipes.searchText: easy basic bacon quiche 8 large eggs 1 cup dairy of choice (milk, half & half, or unsweetened almond milk) 1 deep dish pie crust 1 lb cooked, chopped crispy bacon 8 oz shredded cheddar cheese salt and pepper (optional) preheat oven to 375 degrees f. whisk eggs and dairy together in a large bowl. place pie crust in a 9-inch deep dish pie plate (or use store-bought foil pan). add half the cooked bacon and half the shredded cheese to egg mixture and stir well. pour mixture into pie crust. bake at 375 degrees f for 20 minutes, then add remaining bacon and cheese on top. continue baking for 10 additional minutes until golden brown and raised. cool for about 10 minutes before serving (the quiche will settle as it cools, which is normal). cut and serve.

recipes.title: Easy Garlic Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Spray a casserole dish with cooking spray or line with aluminum foil.
In a small pan, saute minced garlic in olive oil until translucent but not browned. Remove from heat.
Place chicken breasts in the casserole dish and sprinkle with salt and pepper on both sides.
Mix brown sugar into the sauteed garlic and distribute evenly on top of the chicken breasts.
Bake uncovered for 15 to 20 minutes or until chicken is cooked through and the garlic and sugar have melted into a sweet glaze.
recipes.searchText: easy garlic chicken 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts 4 garlic cloves, minced 4 tablespoons brown sugar 3 teaspoons olive oil salt and pepper to taste preheat oven to 400°f. spray a casserole dish with cooking spray or line with aluminum foil. in a small pan, saute minced garlic in olive oil until translucent but not browned. remove from heat. place chicken breasts in the casserole dish and sprinkle with salt and pepper on both sides. mix brown sugar into the sauteed garlic and distribute evenly on top of the chicken breasts. bake uncovered for 15 to 20 minutes or until chicken is cooked through and the garlic and sugar have melted into a sweet glaze.

recipes.title: Easy Mushroom Linguine
instructions: Cook the linguine according to package directions.
Heat butter in a frying pan and cook the sliced mushrooms until soft, golden, and liquid has mostly evaporated.
Add garlic, thyme, and chili flakes; cook for a couple more minutes. Season well.
Drain the linguine, reserving one cup of cooking water.
Combine linguine with mushroom mixture, lemon juice, Parmesan, and parsley. Toss together and add enough reserved water to form a light sauce.
Adjust seasoning and serve.
recipes.searchText: easy mushroom linguine 160 g (5.5 oz) linguine 25 g (2 tablespoons) butter 250 g (9 oz) chestnut mushrooms, sliced 4 cloves garlic, peeled and crushed 4 sprigs fresh thyme, leaves only pinch of chili flakes juice of 1/2 lemon 40 g (1.5 oz) parmesan cheese, grated handful fresh parsley, finely chopped salt and pepper to taste cook the linguine according to package directions. heat butter in a frying pan and cook the sliced mushrooms until soft, golden, and liquid has mostly evaporated. add garlic, thyme, and chili flakes; cook for a couple more minutes. season well. drain the linguine, reserving one cup of cooking water. combine linguine with mushroom mixture, lemon juice, parmesan, and parsley. toss together and add enough reserved water to form a light sauce. adjust seasoning and serve.

recipes.title: Easy Ranch Baby Carrots
ingredients: 1 (16 oz) package baby carrots, patted dry
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Prepare a baking sheet with oil or nonstick spray.
Combine dried parsley, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, dill, and pepper in a small bowl to create the seasoning blend.
Arrange carrots in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. Add olive oil and the seasoning mixture, then toss gently to coat.
Bake for 18-20 minutes until tender.
Stir in butter and let it melt, approximately 1 minute.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley.
recipes.searchText: easy ranch baby carrots 1 (16 oz) package baby carrots, patted dry 2 tablespoons olive oil 2 tablespoons unsalted butter 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley 1 teaspoon dried parsley 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon dried dill 1/4 teaspoon ground black pepper preheat oven to 400 degrees f. prepare a baking sheet with oil or nonstick spray. combine dried parsley, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, dill, and pepper in a small bowl to create the seasoning blend. arrange carrots in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet. add olive oil and the seasoning mixture, then toss gently to coat. bake for 18-20 minutes until tender. stir in butter and let it melt, approximately 1 minute. serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley.

recipes.title: Five Bean Salad
instructions: Rinse and drain each can of beans and corn.
Toss the beans, corn, and diced onion together with the olive oil in a large bowl.
Add salt and pepper, and mix well.
In a separate bowl, dissolve the sugar in the vinegar. Mix with the beans.
Toss well with cilantro and oregano, and serve at room temperature.
recipes.searchText: five bean salad 1 (8.75 oz) can corn 1 (15 oz) can kidney beans 1 (15 oz) can garbanzo beans 1 (15 oz) can pinto beans 1 (15 oz) can cannellini beans 1 (15 oz) can black eyed peas 3/4 cup extra-virgin olive oil 1/2 cup red onion, finely chopped 1/2 cup champagne vinegar 1/3 cup sugar 1 teaspoon kosher salt 3/4 teaspoon freshly ground pepper 1/4 cup fresh cilantro, chopped 2 teaspoons oregano leaves (optional) rinse and drain each can of beans and corn. toss the beans, corn, and diced onion together with the olive oil in a large bowl. add salt and pepper, and mix well. in a separate bowl, dissolve the sugar in the vinegar. mix with the beans. toss well with cilantro and oregano, and serve at room temperature.

recipes.title: French Toast Casserole (Make Ahead)

items: 1 pound loaf of brioche, challah, French bread, or white bread
2 tablespoons cold butter, cut into pieces

instructions: Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish. Cut bread into 1-inch chunks and place in the pan.
Whisk eggs in a large mixing bowl. Add cream, milk, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, and vanilla. Mix well.
Pour egg mixture evenly over the bread cubes and toss gently to combine. Spread into an even layer.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.

Make the crumb topping: combine brown sugar, white sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl. Add cold butter and use a pastry blender or your hands to combine until crumbly. Cover and refrigerate until morning.
In the morning, preheat oven to 350°F.
Uncover the casserole and sprinkle the crumb topping evenly over the top.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the top is golden and the casserole is set.
Allow to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving. Top with maple syrup, berries, or whipped cream.
recipes.searchText: french toast casserole (make ahead) 1 pound loaf of brioche, challah, french bread, or white bread 8 large eggs 1 cup heavy cream 2 cups milk 1/4 cup light brown sugar 2 teaspoons ground cinnamon 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt 1 tablespoon vanilla extract 3 tablespoons light brown sugar, packed 3 tablespoons granulated sugar 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg 2 tablespoons cold butter, cut into pieces grease a 9x13 inch baking dish. cut bread into 1-inch chunks and place in the pan. whisk eggs in a large mixing bowl. add cream, milk, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, and vanilla. mix well. pour egg mixture evenly over the bread cubes and toss gently to combine. spread into an even layer. cover and refrigerate overnight. make the crumb topping: combine brown sugar, white sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a bowl. add cold butter and use a pastry blender or your hands to combine until crumbly. cover and refrigerate until morning. in the morning, preheat oven to 350°f. uncover the casserole and sprinkle the crumb topping evenly over the top. bake for 45-50 minutes or until the top is golden and the casserole is set. allow to cool for at least 10 minutes before serving. top with maple syrup, berries, or whipped cream.

recipes.title: Garlic Butter Shrimp and Quinoa
instructions: Heat oil in a large nonstick pot over medium-high heat. Add onion and saute until softened, about 5 minutes. Add 2 teaspoons garlic and saute for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Add uncooked quinoa and 1/2 teaspoon chili powder. Season with salt and pepper. Saute for 1 minute. Add broth, bring to a boil, cover and cook 15-20 minutes until quinoa is soft. Fluff with a fork and toss with fresh parsley.

While quinoa cooks, heat 1 tablespoon butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shrimp, sprinkle with remaining 1/2 teaspoon chili powder, and season with salt and pepper. Saute until no longer translucent and golden brown. Add 1 teaspoon garlic at the end and swirl until fragrant.
Melt remaining 5 tablespoons butter with 2 teaspoons garlic to create a drizzling sauce.
Serve quinoa and shrimp together. Top with fresh parsley and lemon juice if desired. Drizzle butter sauce over top and serve immediately while hot.
recipes.searchText: garlic butter shrimp and quinoa 1 tablespoon olive oil 1/2 cup finely chopped onion 5 teaspoons minced garlic, divided 2 cups uncooked quinoa 1 teaspoon chili powder, divided 4 cups vegetable or chicken broth 6 tablespoons salted butter, divided 1 pound raw tail-on shrimp salt and pepper to taste fresh parsley for serving fresh lemon juice for serving heat oil in a large nonstick pot over medium-high heat. add onion and saute until softened, about 5 minutes. add 2 teaspoons garlic and saute for 1 minute, stirring constantly. add uncooked quinoa and 1/2 teaspoon chili powder. season with salt and pepper. saute for 1 minute. add broth, bring to a boil, cover and cook 15-20 minutes until quinoa is soft. fluff with a fork and toss with fresh parsley. while quinoa cooks, heat 1 tablespoon butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. add shrimp, sprinkle with remaining 1/2 teaspoon chili powder, and season with salt and pepper. saute until no longer translucent and golden brown. add 1 teaspoon garlic at the end and swirl until fragrant. melt remaining 5 tablespoons butter with 2 teaspoons garlic to create a drizzling sauce. serve quinoa and shrimp together. top with fresh parsley and lemon juice if desired. drizzle butter sauce over top and serve immediately while hot.

recipes.title: Ginger Coconut Green Linguine
ingredients: 1 bunch fresh Swiss chard, de-stemmed and chopped
instructions: Bring salted water to a boil and cook pasta to al dente according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
Heat oil in a large saute pan over low heat. Add garlic and ginger, sauteing until fragrant, 3-5 minutes.
Add coconut milk, sugar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. Stir well and bring to a slight simmer over medium heat.
Add Swiss chard and spinach. Cover and simmer 5 minutes over low heat until greens wilt.
Transfer mixture to a blender, add basil, and blend on high until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust seasonings.
Return sauce to the saute pan and stir in cooked pasta to coat.
Serve hot.
recipes.searchText: ginger coconut green linguine 16 oz linguine, dry 1/2 tablespoon olive oil 3 garlic cloves, minced 2 1/2 tablespoons fresh ginger, minced 1 (15 oz) can lite coconut milk 2 teaspoons vegan sugar 2 teaspoons lemon juice 1 teaspoon kosher salt 1/2 teaspoon fresh black pepper red pepper flakes, to taste 1 bunch fresh swiss chard, de-stemmed and chopped 2 large handfuls fresh spinach 1/4 cup fresh basil (optional) bring salted water to a boil and cook pasta to al dente according to package directions. drain and set aside. heat oil in a large saute pan over low heat. add garlic and ginger, sauteing until fragrant, 3-5 minutes. add coconut milk, sugar, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes. stir well and bring to a slight simmer over medium heat. add swiss chard and spinach. cover and simmer 5 minutes over low heat until greens wilt. transfer mixture to a blender, add basil, and blend on high until smooth and creamy. taste and adjust seasonings. return sauce to the saute pan and stir in cooked pasta to coat. serve hot.

recipes.title: Grilled Ginger Sesame Chicken Chopped Salad

items: 1 lb napa cabbage, halved lengthwise and thinly sliced crosswise
2/3 cup slivered or sliced almonds, toasted

instructions: Whisk together soy sauce, ginger, canola oil, hoisin sauce, sesame oil, Sriracha, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Add chicken breasts to a resealable bag with 3 tablespoons of the marinade mixture, reserving the remainder. Seal and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 1 day.
Combine red wine vinegar and 1/4 cup chopped green onions with the reserved marinade mixture to make the dressing. Set aside.
Heat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat. Brush lightly with oil and cook marinated chicken about 4 minutes per side until cooked through (165 degrees F internal).
Transfer chicken to a cutting board, rest 10 minutes, then cut crosswise into 1/4-inch thick strips.
In a large bowl, toss cabbage, chicken, carrots, almonds, chopped green onions, and cilantro with enough dressing to coat.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve.
