recipes.searchText: slow cooker honey lime ginger pork 2.5 pounds pork loin 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon ground black pepper 1/2 cup honey 1/4 cup soy sauce 1 tablespoon worcestershire sauce 2 teaspoons lime juice (about 1 lime) 2 teaspoons minced garlic 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger (or 1 tablespoon peeled and minced fresh ginger) 2 tablespoons cornstarch chopped cilantro, for garnish lime wedges, for garnish heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. season the pork loin with salt and pepper, then brown on all sides by turning every 1-2 minutes. transfer to a greased slow cooker. whisk together honey, soy sauce, worcestershire sauce, lime juice, minced garlic, and ginger in a bowl. pour the mixture over the pork and cover. cook on low for 6-8 hours or on high for 4-6 hours until the internal temperature reaches 160 degrees f. remove the pork to a serving plate and cover with foil. pour the liquid from the slow cooker into a saucepan. whisk in cornstarch and cook over medium-high heat until thickened into a sauce. pour sauce over the pork. garnish with cilantro and lime wedges, then serve.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Honey Teriyaki Chicken
instructions: Spray the slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray and place chicken breasts in the bottom.
Whisk together soy sauce, honey, rice wine vinegar, onion, garlic, pepper, and ginger in a small bowl.
Pour sauce mixture over the chicken. Cover and cook on HIGH for 3-4 hours or LOW for 5-6 hours.
Remove cooked chicken with a slotted spoon and shred using two forks.
Pour sauce into a saucepan. Whisk together water and cornstarch, then slowly whisk into the sauce on medium-high heat. Boil and stir until thickened (about 2 minutes).
Add shredded chicken back to the slow cooker, pour sauce on top, and stir to coat. Serve over rice and garnish as desired.
recipes.searchText: slow cooker honey teriyaki chicken 4 boneless skinless chicken breasts (about 2 pounds) 1/2 cup soy sauce 1/2 cup honey 1/4 cup rice wine vinegar 1/4 cup chopped onion 2 teaspoons minced garlic 1/4 teaspoon pepper 3/4 teaspoon ground ginger 1/4 cup water 3 tablespoons cornstarch green onions (optional garnish) sesame seeds (optional garnish) spray the slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray and place chicken breasts in the bottom. whisk together soy sauce, honey, rice wine vinegar, onion, garlic, pepper, and ginger in a small bowl. pour sauce mixture over the chicken. cover and cook on high for 3-4 hours or low for 5-6 hours. remove cooked chicken with a slotted spoon and shred using two forks. pour sauce into a saucepan. whisk together water and cornstarch, then slowly whisk into the sauce on medium-high heat. boil and stir until thickened (about 2 minutes). add shredded chicken back to the slow cooker, pour sauce on top, and stir to coat. serve over rice and garnish as desired.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Potato Corn Chowder
ingredients: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
instructions: Place potatoes and corn into a 6-quart slow cooker. Stir in flour and gently toss to combine. Add chicken stock, thyme, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper to taste.
Cover and cook on LOW for 7-8 hours or HIGH for 3-4 hours.
Stir in butter and heavy cream.
Serve immediately.
recipes.searchText: slow cooker potato corn chowder 24 ounces red potatoes, diced 1 (16-ounce) package frozen corn 3 tablespoons all-purpose flour 6 cups chicken stock 1 teaspoon dried thyme 1 teaspoon dried oregano 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon onion powder kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste 2 tablespoons unsalted butter 1/4 cup heavy cream place potatoes and corn into a 6-quart slow cooker. stir in flour and gently toss to combine. add chicken stock, thyme, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper to taste. cover and cook on low for 7-8 hours or high for 3-4 hours. stir in butter and heavy cream. serve immediately.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Sausage, Spinach and White Bean Soup
ingredients: 1 (12.8-ounce) package smoked andouille sausage, thinly sliced
2 (15-ounce) cans Great Northern beans, drained and rinsed
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sausage and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Place sausage, garlic, onion, carrots, celery, beans, oregano, and bay leaves into a 6-quart slow cooker. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Stir in chicken broth and 2 cups water. Cover and cook on LOW for 7-8 hours or HIGH for 3-4 hours.
Stir in spinach until wilted.
Serve immediately, topped with Parmesan.
recipes.searchText: slow cooker sausage, spinach and white bean soup 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 (12.8-ounce) package smoked andouille sausage, thinly sliced 3 cloves garlic, minced 1 onion, diced 3 carrots, peeled and diced 2 celery ribs, diced 2 (15-ounce) cans great northern beans, drained and rinsed 1/2 teaspoon dried oregano 2 bay leaves 4 cups chicken broth kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste 3 cups baby spinach 1/2 cup shaved parmesan heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. add sausage and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes. place sausage, garlic, onion, carrots, celery, beans, oregano, and bay leaves into a 6-quart slow cooker. season with salt and pepper to taste. stir in chicken broth and 2 cups water. cover and cook on low for 7-8 hours or high for 3-4 hours. stir in spinach until wilted. serve immediately, topped with parmesan.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Spaghetti Squash and Meatballs
ingredients: Additional salt and pepper to taste
instructions: Cut spaghetti squash in half crosswise and place in the bottom of a 6-quart slow cooker, cut-side down.
Combine tomatoes, salt, garlic powder, pepper, and oregano in a blender; puree until smooth and pour into slow cooker.
Place meatballs over tomatoes around spaghetti squash.
Cook on low for 6-7 hours or on high for 3-4 hours.
Remove spaghetti squash using tongs and kitchen gloves. Scoop out seeds and discard. Scoop flesh into a sieve to drain excess moisture, then transfer to a bowl and toss with butter or oil.
Divide between 4 plates and top with sauce and meatballs.
recipes.searchText: slow cooker spaghetti squash and meatballs 1 medium spaghetti squash 1 1/2 cups crushed tomatoes 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/4 teaspoon pepper 1/4 teaspoon dried oregano 16 chicken meatballs 2 tablespoons butter or olive oil additional salt and pepper to taste cut spaghetti squash in half crosswise and place in the bottom of a 6-quart slow cooker, cut-side down. combine tomatoes, salt, garlic powder, pepper, and oregano in a blender; puree until smooth and pour into slow cooker. place meatballs over tomatoes around spaghetti squash. cook on low for 6-7 hours or on high for 3-4 hours. remove spaghetti squash using tongs and kitchen gloves. scoop out seeds and discard. scoop flesh into a sieve to drain excess moisture, then transfer to a bowl and toss with butter or oil. divide between 4 plates and top with sauce and meatballs.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Taco Soup
instructions: In a large skillet, saute onions for 2 minutes.
Add the ground beef to the onions and brown the meat, breaking it up as it cooks.
Drain browned ground beef and onions to remove excess fat.
Add ground beef mixture and all other ingredients (do not drain corn or black beans) to the slow cooker. Stir to combine.
Cook on HIGH for 4 hours or LOW for 6 hours.
Serve with tortilla chips, sour cream, and shredded cheddar cheese.
recipes.searchText: slow cooker taco soup 2 pounds ground beef 1 medium onion, diced 2 packets ranch dressing mix 2 packets taco seasoning 32 ounces chicken broth 1 (14.5-ounce) can tomato sauce 1 (29-ounce) can diced tomatoes with chiles 1 (14.5-ounce) can black beans (do not drain) 1 (15-ounce) can corn (do not drain) tortilla chips, for serving sour cream, for serving shredded cheddar cheese, for serving in a large skillet, saute onions for 2 minutes. add the ground beef to the onions and brown the meat, breaking it up as it cooks. drain browned ground beef and onions to remove excess fat. add ground beef mixture and all other ingredients (do not drain corn or black beans) to the slow cooker. stir to combine. cook on high for 4 hours or low for 6 hours. serve with tortilla chips, sour cream, and shredded cheddar cheese.

recipes.title: Slow Cooker Tomato Basil Parmesan Soup
ingredients: 2 (14 oz) cans diced tomatoes, with juice
1 teaspoon dried oregano (or 1 tablespoon fresh oregano)
2 cups half and half, warmed (or milk for fewer calories)
instructions: Combine tomatoes, celery, carrots, onions, oregano, basil, chicken broth, and bay leaf in a large slow cooker.
Cover and cook on LOW for 5 to 7 hours (or HIGH for 3 to 4 hours) until vegetables soften and flavors blend.
Blend the vegetables until smooth using a blender or immersion blender. Return to slow cooker.

About 30 minutes before serving, melt butter over low heat in a skillet and blend in flour. Whisk constantly for 5 to 7 minutes to make a roux. Gradually whisk in hot soup, then add roux mixture back to slow cooker.
Add Parmesan cheese, warmed half and half, salt, and pepper to the slow cooker.
Cook on LOW for another 30 minutes. Serve with warm rolls, salad, and optional orzo pasta garnish.
recipes.searchText: slow cooker tomato basil parmesan soup 2 (14 oz) cans diced tomatoes, with juice 1 cup finely diced celery 1 cup finely diced carrots 1 cup finely diced onions 1 teaspoon dried oregano (or 1 tablespoon fresh oregano) 1/4 cup fresh basil 4 cups chicken broth 1/2 bay leaf 1/2 cup butter 1/2 cup flour 1 cup grated parmesan cheese 2 cups half and half, warmed (or milk for fewer calories) 1 teaspoon salt 1/4 teaspoon black pepper cooked orzo pasta (optional) combine tomatoes, celery, carrots, onions, oregano, basil, chicken broth, and bay leaf in a large slow cooker. cover and cook on low for 5 to 7 hours (or high for 3 to 4 hours) until vegetables soften and flavors blend. blend the vegetables until smooth using a blender or immersion blender. return to slow cooker. about 30 minutes before serving, melt butter over low heat in a skillet and blend in flour. whisk constantly for 5 to 7 minutes to make a roux. gradually whisk in hot soup, then add roux mixture back to slow cooker. add parmesan cheese, warmed half and half, salt, and pepper to the slow cooker. cook on low for another 30 minutes. serve with warm rolls, salad, and optional orzo pasta garnish.

recipes.title: Smoked Jerk Chicken with Caribbean Rum Sauce

items: 1 scotch bonnet pepper (or 1 habanero or 2 jalapenos)
3 pounds chicken thighs, drums, or breasts
1 tablespoon ginger paste (or fresh grated ginger)

steps: Blend all marinade ingredients (except chicken) on high speed until slightly chunky, resembling applesauce.
Transfer mixture to a zip bag or container and completely submerge the chicken.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or up to 24 hours.
Set up smoker at 275°F using pimento wood or fruitwood (apple or cherry) if available.
Remove chicken from marinade and place on smoker. Smoke for 1.5 to 2 hours until internal temperature reaches 165°F, turning occasionally.
Alternatively, grill at 400-450°F for about 25 minutes, turning every 8 minutes to develop light char.
Combine all sauce ingredients in a saucepan over medium-high heat.
Once it comes to a boil, turn heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, whisking occasionally.
Brush sauce onto chicken during the last 15 minutes of cooking, or serve alongside.

recipes.searchText: smoked jerk chicken with caribbean rum sauce 1 peeled sweet onion 3 green onions 1 scotch bonnet pepper (or 1 habanero or 2 jalapenos) 6 garlic cloves 6 fresh thyme sprigs 1 teaspoon peeled fresh ginger 2 tablespoons brown sugar 1/4 cup soy sauce 1/4 cup white vinegar 1/2 cup olive oil juice of 2 limes 1 tablespoon sea salt 1/2 teaspoon ground black pepper 1 tablespoon ground cinnamon 1 teaspoon nutmeg 1/2 teaspoon cloves 3 pounds chicken thighs, drums, or breasts 1 cup brown sugar 3/4 cup dark rum 3/4 cup ketchup 1/4 cup soy sauce 2 tablespoons lime juice 2 tablespoons jerk seasoning 3 cloves garlic, minced 1 tablespoon ginger paste (or fresh grated ginger) blend all marinade ingredients (except chicken) on high speed until slightly chunky, resembling applesauce. transfer mixture to a zip bag or container and completely submerge the chicken. cover and refrigerate for at least 4 hours or up to 24 hours. set up smoker at 275°f using pimento wood or fruitwood (apple or cherry) if available. remove chicken from marinade and place on smoker. smoke for 1.5 to 2 hours until internal temperature reaches 165°f, turning occasionally. alternatively, grill at 400-450°f for about 25 minutes, turning every 8 minutes to develop light char. combine all sauce ingredients in a saucepan over medium-high heat. whisk together until evenly combined. once it comes to a boil, turn heat to low and simmer for 5-7 minutes, whisking occasionally. brush sauce onto chicken during the last 15 minutes of cooking, or serve alongside.

recipes.title: Spinach Feta Mac and Cheese
ingredients: Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add onions and salt; cook 2-3 minutes until softened. Stir in garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add tomatoes, spinach, cheeses, macaroni, vegetable broth, milk, and seasonings. Mix to combine and bring to a boil, stirring frequently.
Lower heat to medium-low, cover with lid, and cook 12-15 minutes until pasta is cooked. Stir frequently (every 3 minutes) to prevent sticking.
Remove from heat and stir well. Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.
recipes.searchText: spinach feta mac and cheese 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 small yellow onion, finely diced 1/4 teaspoon salt 2 garlic cloves, minced 2 fresh tomatoes, diced 8 to 10 ounces fresh baby spinach 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese 1/2 cup cubed white cheddar cheese 1/2 cup shredded mozzarella cheese 2 cups elbow macaroni 1 cup vegetable broth 1 cup milk (dairy-free nut milk acceptable) 1 teaspoon italian seasoning salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste parsley for garnish heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. add onions and salt; cook 2-3 minutes until softened. stir in garlic and cook 30 seconds until fragrant. add tomatoes, spinach, cheeses, macaroni, vegetable broth, milk, and seasonings. mix to combine and bring to a boil, stirring frequently. lower heat to medium-low, cover with lid, and cook 12-15 minutes until pasta is cooked. stir frequently (every 3 minutes) to prevent sticking. remove from heat and stir well. garnish with parsley and serve immediately.

recipes.title: Sriracha Quesarito
instructions: Mix all taco seasoning ingredients together and set aside.
Combine all Sriracha cream sauce ingredients, adjusting Sriracha to taste. Set aside.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Brown ground meat, breaking into small pieces. Season with salt. Add taco seasoning and 1/2 cup water. Simmer 6-8 minutes until water evaporates.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Layer cheese between two tortillas on a foil-lined baking sheet. Seal with foil and bake 5 minutes until cheese melts.
Remove foil and top with rice, beef, Sriracha sauce, and sour cream. Roll into a burrito.
recipes.searchText: sriracha quesarito large flour tortillas shredded cheddar cheese 1 pound ground meat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil kosher salt cilantro lime rice sour cream 1/2 tablespoon flour 1/2 tablespoon cornstarch 2 teaspoons onion powder 2 teaspoons garlic powder 1 teaspoon paprika 1 teaspoon chili powder 1/2 teaspoon cumin 1/2 teaspoon granulated sugar 1/4 cup sour cream 1/4 cup mayonnaise 1 1/2 tablespoons sriracha 1 teaspoon granulated sugar 1/4 teaspoon cumin 1/4 teaspoon chili powder 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder pinch of kosher salt mix all taco seasoning ingredients together and set aside. combine all sriracha cream sauce ingredients, adjusting sriracha to taste. set aside. heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. brown ground meat, breaking into small pieces. season with salt. add taco seasoning and 1/2 cup water. simmer 6-8 minutes until water evaporates. preheat oven to 350 degrees f. layer cheese between two tortillas on a foil-lined baking sheet. seal with foil and bake 5 minutes until cheese melts. remove foil and top with rice, beef, sriracha sauce, and sour cream. roll into a burrito.

recipes.title: Strawberry Pineapple Kale Smoothie
ingredients: 1 cup chopped kale, ribs and thick stems removed
instructions: Combine strawberries, milk, honey, and 1/2 cup ice in a blender until smooth. Set aside.
Combine kale, pineapple, banana, apple juice, and 1/2 cup ice in blender until smooth. Set aside.
Serve strawberry mixture immediately, topped with kale mixture.
recipes.searchText: strawberry pineapple kale smoothie 1 1/2 cups strawberries 1/2 cup milk 1 tablespoon honey (optional) 1 cup chopped kale, ribs and thick stems removed 1/2 cup chopped pineapple 1 banana 1/2 cup apple juice 1 cup ice (divided) combine strawberries, milk, honey, and 1/2 cup ice in a blender until smooth. set aside. combine kale, pineapple, banana, apple juice, and 1/2 cup ice in blender until smooth. set aside. serve strawberry mixture immediately, topped with kale mixture.

recipes.title: Super Soft Chocolate Chip Cookies
instructions: In a large bowl or stand mixer, combine butter and sugars until light and fluffy. Mix in egg and vanilla, then add salt, baking soda, and baking powder. Scrape bowl as needed. Incorporate flour until no streaks remain. Fold in chocolate chips by hand. Refrigerate dough for at least 1-2 hours until thoroughly chilled.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Line a baking sheet with a silicone mat. Scoop dough with a large cookie scoop (approximately 3 tablespoons), spacing 2-3 inches apart.
Bake for 12-13 minutes. Cool on pan for 3-5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Store in an airtight container for up to several days or freeze for later.
recipes.searchText: super soft chocolate chip cookies 1/2 cup unsalted butter, softened 1/2 cup granulated sugar 1/2 cup light brown sugar 1 large egg 1 1/2 teaspoons vanilla extract 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon baking soda 3/4 teaspoon baking powder 1 3/4 cups all-purpose flour 1 cup semi-sweet chocolate chips in a large bowl or stand mixer, combine butter and sugars until light and fluffy. mix in egg and vanilla, then add salt, baking soda, and baking powder. scrape bowl as needed. incorporate flour until no streaks remain. fold in chocolate chips by hand. refrigerate dough for at least 1-2 hours until thoroughly chilled. preheat oven to 350 degrees f. line a baking sheet with a silicone mat. scoop dough with a large cookie scoop (approximately 3 tablespoons), spacing 2-3 inches apart. bake for 12-13 minutes. cool on pan for 3-5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely. store in an airtight container for up to several days or freeze for later.

recipes.title: Sweet Balsamic Brussels Sprouts
ingredients: 1 pound Brussels sprouts, trimmed and halved
2 tablespoons dried cranberries or pomegranate arils
instructions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees F and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Place Brussels sprouts on the prepared sheet and drizzle with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and honey. Season with salt and pepper, then toss to coat evenly. Arrange them cut-side down in a single layer with space between each one.
Roast for 20 to 30 minutes until tender and golden brown at the edges. Cooking time varies depending on sprout size.
Transfer to a serving dish and gently toss with toasted pecans and cranberries. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve.
recipes.searchText: sweet balsamic brussels sprouts 1 pound brussels sprouts, trimmed and halved 2 tablespoons extra-virgin olive oil 1 1/2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar 2 teaspoons honey or maple syrup 1/2 teaspoon sea salt freshly ground black pepper 1/3 cup toasted pecan halves 2 tablespoons dried cranberries or pomegranate arils fresh parsley leaves for garnish preheat oven to 425 degrees f and line a baking sheet with parchment paper. place brussels sprouts on the prepared sheet and drizzle with olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and honey. season with salt and pepper, then toss to coat evenly. arrange them cut-side down in a single layer with space between each one. roast for 20 to 30 minutes until tender and golden brown at the edges. cooking time varies depending on sprout size. transfer to a serving dish and gently toss with toasted pecans and cranberries. garnish with fresh parsley and serve.

recipes.title: Sweet Potato, Kale, and Shrimp Skillet
ingredients: 3 cups trimmed and coarsely chopped kale leaves
2 cups peeled and deveined fresh shrimp
Salt and ground black pepper, to taste
instructions: Heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add onions and red pepper flakes. Cook until onions are soft and golden.
Add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds.
Add sweet potato and cook until soft, approximately 10-15 minutes. Add water if needed to steam.
Add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes until they turn pink.
Reduce heat to low and add kale, stirring until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
recipes.searchText: sweet potato, kale, and shrimp skillet 2 tablespoons olive oil 1/2 cup onion, diced red pepper flakes, to taste 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 cups sweet potatoes, diced 3 cups trimmed and coarsely chopped kale leaves 2 cups peeled and deveined fresh shrimp salt and ground black pepper, to taste heat olive oil in a saucepan over medium heat. add onions and red pepper flakes. cook until onions are soft and golden. add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds. add sweet potato and cook until soft, approximately 10-15 minutes. add water if needed to steam. add shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes until they turn pink. reduce heat to low and add kale, stirring until wilted. season with salt and pepper to taste.

recipes.title: Teriyaki Salmon with Sriracha Cream Sauce
instructions: Whisk together cornstarch and 1/4 cup water; set aside.
In a small saucepan over medium heat, add soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, garlic powder, honey, and 1 cup water. Bring to a simmer.
Stir in cornstarch mixture until thickened enough to coat the back of a spoon, about 2 minutes. Let cool to room temperature.
In a gallon-size Ziploc bag or large bowl, combine teriyaki marinade and salmon fillets. Marinate for at least 30 minutes to overnight, turning occasionally.
Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. Lightly coat a 9x13 baking dish with nonstick spray.
Place salmon fillets with the marinade into the prepared baking dish and bake until the fish flakes easily with a fork, about 20 minutes.
For the sauce: whisk together mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons Sriracha, and condensed milk.
Serve salmon immediately with Sriracha cream sauce.
recipes.searchText: teriyaki salmon with sriracha cream sauce 1 tablespoon cornstarch 1/4 cup reduced sodium soy sauce 1/4 cup brown sugar, packed 1/2 teaspoon ground ginger 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder 2 tablespoons honey 1 cup water 4 (5 oz) salmon fillets 1/2 cup mayonnaise 2-3 tablespoons sriracha 1 1/2 tablespoons sweetened condensed milk whisk together cornstarch and 1/4 cup water; set aside. in a small saucepan over medium heat, add soy sauce, brown sugar, ginger, garlic powder, honey, and 1 cup water. bring to a simmer. stir in cornstarch mixture until thickened enough to coat the back of a spoon, about 2 minutes. let cool to room temperature. in a gallon-size ziploc bag or large bowl, combine teriyaki marinade and salmon fillets. marinate for at least 30 minutes to overnight, turning occasionally. preheat oven to 400 degrees f. lightly coat a 9x13 baking dish with nonstick spray. place salmon fillets with the marinade into the prepared baking dish and bake until the fish flakes easily with a fork, about 20 minutes. for the sauce: whisk together mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons sriracha, and condensed milk. serve salmon immediately with sriracha cream sauce.

recipes.title: Garlic Butter Tomato Baked Chicken with Mozzarella
instructions: Combine olive oil, white wine vinegar, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, and Italian seasoning in a zip-top bag. Add chicken breasts, season with salt and pepper, seal, and massage to coat evenly. Let sit 10 to 15 minutes.
Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
In an oven-safe baking dish, combine cherry tomatoes, balsamic vinegar, melted butter, honey, garlic, basil, onion powder, dried thyme, salt, and pepper. Toss to combine.
Arrange tomatoes around the edges of the dish and place marinated chicken breasts in the center.
Bake uncovered for 18 to 22 minutes or until the chicken is almost cooked through.
Top chicken with shredded mozzarella and broil briefly until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh basil or parsley. Serve with bread, pasta, rice, or vegetables.
recipes.searchText: garlic butter tomato baked chicken with mozzarella 1 tablespoon olive oil 1 tablespoon white wine vinegar 3 cloves garlic, minced 1/4 to 1/2 teaspoon red pepper flakes 1/2 teaspoon italian seasoning 4 boneless, skinless chicken breasts 1 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon black pepper 3 cups halved cherry tomatoes 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar 2 tablespoons melted butter 1 tablespoon honey 4 cloves garlic, minced 2 tablespoons chopped basil 1/2 teaspoon onion powder 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme salt and pepper to taste 1 1/2 cups shredded mozzarella cheese combine olive oil, white wine vinegar, minced garlic, red pepper flakes, and italian seasoning in a zip-top bag. add chicken breasts, season with salt and pepper, seal, and massage to coat evenly. let sit 10 to 15 minutes. preheat oven to 425 degrees f. in an oven-safe baking dish, combine cherry tomatoes, balsamic vinegar, melted butter, honey, garlic, basil, onion powder, dried thyme, salt, and pepper. toss to combine. arrange tomatoes around the edges of the dish and place marinated chicken breasts in the center. bake uncovered for 18 to 22 minutes or until the chicken is almost cooked through. top chicken with shredded mozzarella and broil briefly until cheese is melted and bubbly. garnish with fresh basil or parsley. serve with bread, pasta, rice, or vegetables.

recipes.title: Torre de Fondue de Queso (Cheese Fondue Tower)

items: 3 small wheels of brie or Camembert cheese, about 12 oz (300 g) each, all the same diameter
Cold cuts and sour gherkins for serving (optional)

instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. Add warm water and olive oil, mixing until the dough comes together. Knead for 5 minutes on a floured surface until smooth.
Shape dough into a ball and place in an oiled bowl. Cover with a damp cloth and let rise in a warm spot for 2 hours or until doubled in volume.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (180 degrees C) with rack in the middle position.
Using a sharp knife, remove the rind from the top of one cheese wheel. Remove the rind from the top and bottom of the other two cheese wheels and stack them on top of the first to form a tower.

On a lightly floured surface, roll the dough out to form a 10-inch circle. Center the cheese tower on the dough, fold the dough up and over to cover completely, and seal. Place seam-side down in a 13x9-inch baking dish. Let rest 15 minutes. Brush with 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Toss baby potatoes with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and pepper. Arrange around the cheese tower in the baking dish.
Bake for 45 minutes or until the dough is nicely browned.
Using a bread knife, remove the top of the dough to reveal the melted cheese inside. If cheese is not fully melted, return to oven for 5 more minutes.
Serve immediately from the baking dish, dipping potatoes, bread, cold cuts, or gherkins into the melted cheese.
recipes.searchText: torre de fondue de queso (cheese fondue tower) 1 cup (150 g) unbleached all-purpose flour 1 teaspoon sugar 1/2 teaspoon instant yeast 1/2 teaspoon salt 1/3 cup (75 ml) warm water 2 tablespoons (30 ml) olive oil 3 small wheels of brie or camembert cheese, about 12 oz (300 g) each, all the same diameter 2 tablespoons (30 ml) olive oil, divided 1 lb (450 g) small baby potatoes salt and pepper to taste cold cuts and sour gherkins for serving (optional) in a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. add warm water and olive oil, mixing until the dough comes together. knead for 5 minutes on a floured surface until smooth. shape dough into a ball and place in an oiled bowl. cover with a damp cloth and let rise in a warm spot for 2 hours or until doubled in volume. preheat oven to 350 degrees f (180 degrees c) with rack in the middle position. using a sharp knife, remove the rind from the top of one cheese wheel. remove the rind from the top and bottom of the other two cheese wheels and stack them on top of the first to form a tower. on a lightly floured surface, roll the dough out to form a 10-inch circle. center the cheese tower on the dough, fold the dough up and over to cover completely, and seal. place seam-side down in a 13x9-inch baking dish. let rest 15 minutes. brush with 1 tablespoon olive oil. toss baby potatoes with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and pepper. arrange around the cheese tower in the baking dish. bake for 45 minutes or until the dough is nicely browned. using a bread knife, remove the top of the dough to reveal the melted cheese inside. if cheese is not fully melted, return to oven for 5 more minutes. serve immediately from the baking dish, dipping potatoes, bread, cold cuts, or gherkins into the melted cheese.

recipes.title: Turkey and Kale Pasta Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F and prepare a 9x13 baking dish with spray oil or olive oil.
Cook pasta according to package instructions, stopping just before al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water.
Heat a large skillet on medium heat and add olive oil until warm.
Add onion and garlic, stirring until fragrant.
Add ground turkey and cook until almost all pink is gone.
Add marinara, pasta, kale, balsamic vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper. Mix well. Add pasta water and mix again.
In baking dish, add half the mixture and spread 1 cup shredded mozzarella evenly across it.
Add remaining mixture and top with remaining mozzarella.
Cover with foil and bake for 18 minutes or until mozzarella is melted.
recipes.searchText: turkey and kale pasta bake 3.5 cups pasta (casarecce or similar shape) 3 cups kale, chopped small 1 lb ground turkey 28 oz marinara sauce 2 cups shredded mozzarella 1 cup pasta water (reserved) 1/3 cup fresh italian parsley 1 tablespoon balsamic vinegar 1 tablespoon honey 1 white onion, diced 3 cloves garlic, minced 2 tablespoons olive oil 1 teaspoon salt 1 teaspoon black pepper 1 teaspoon dried basil 1 teaspoon dried oregano preheat oven to 350 degrees f and prepare a 9x13 baking dish with spray oil or olive oil. cook pasta according to package instructions, stopping just before al dente. reserve 1 cup pasta water. heat a large skillet on medium heat and add olive oil until warm. add onion and garlic, stirring until fragrant. add ground turkey and cook until almost all pink is gone. add marinara, pasta, kale, balsamic vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper. mix well. add pasta water and mix again. in baking dish, add half the mixture and spread 1 cup shredded mozzarella evenly across it. add remaining mixture and top with remaining mozzarella. cover with foil and bake for 18 minutes or until mozzarella is melted.

recipes.title: Watermelon Cucumber Cooler
instructions: Make the cucumber simple syrup: In a small pot over medium heat, combine the sugar and water. Bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve the sugar completely.
Remove the pot from the heat and stir in the sliced cucumber. Let steep, covered, for at least 4 hours or up to overnight.
Strain the syrup through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth, pressing to extract as much syrup as possible. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the gin, watermelon juice, lime juice, and cucumber simple syrup. Shake vigorously for 20 seconds.
Strain into a glass filled with ice and top with club soda.
Garnish with the cucumber slice and serve.
recipes.searchText: watermelon cucumber cooler 1 cup sugar 1 cup water 1 cucumber, sliced ice 2 oz gin 1 1/2 oz watermelon juice (fresh juiced) 1/2 oz lime juice 1 oz cucumber simple syrup club soda to top 1 slice cucumber for garnish make the cucumber simple syrup: in a small pot over medium heat, combine the sugar and water. bring to a boil, stirring to dissolve the sugar completely. remove the pot from the heat and stir in the sliced cucumber. let steep, covered, for at least 4 hours or up to overnight. strain the syrup through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth, pressing to extract as much syrup as possible. store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 month. in a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the gin, watermelon juice, lime juice, and cucumber simple syrup. shake vigorously for 20 seconds. strain into a glass filled with ice and top with club soda. garnish with the cucumber slice and serve.

recipes.title: White Bean Chili
ingredients: 1 1/2 cans chopped green chilies (or jalapeno peppers)
1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breast, finely chopped
instructions: Wash beans, cover with water, and soak for 2 hours. Drain.
Place beans in a large pot with chicken stock and bring to a boil.
In a saucepan, heat butter and saute garlic, onion, and chilies for 5 minutes.
Add the sauteed mixture to the bean pot.
Add chicken, cumin, oregano, black pepper, white pepper, red pepper flakes, and cilantro.
Lower heat to medium and cook, stirring occasionally, for approximately 1 1/2 hours.
Serve with cornbread.
recipes.searchText: white bean chili 1 lb dried navy beans 5 cups chicken stock 4 tablespoons (1/2 stick) butter 1 tablespoon minced garlic 3/4 cup diced onion 1 1/2 cans chopped green chilies (or jalapeno peppers) 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breast, finely chopped 1 tablespoon ground cumin 1 tablespoon dried oregano 1 to 2 teaspoons ground black pepper 1/2 teaspoon white pepper 1/2 bunch cilantro, chopped red pepper flakes to taste wash beans, cover with water, and soak for 2 hours. drain. place beans in a large pot with chicken stock and bring to a boil. in a saucepan, heat butter and saute garlic, onion, and chilies for 5 minutes. add the sauteed mixture to the bean pot. add chicken, cumin, oregano, black pepper, white pepper, red pepper flakes, and cilantro. lower heat to medium and cook, stirring occasionally, for approximately 1 1/2 hours. serve with cornbread.

recipes.title: White Spinach Queso
ingredients: 1 (15-ounce) can diced tomatoes with green chiles, drained
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add diced onion and jalapeno, saute until tender.
Stir in white American cheese, pepper jack cheese, and half and half until melted and smooth.
Add drained tomatoes with green chiles, fresh spinach, and cilantro. Stir well.
Transfer to a serving dish and serve with tortilla chips.
recipes.searchText: white spinach queso 1 tablespoon olive oil 1/2 cup diced white onion 1 jalapeno, seeded and diced 12 ounces shredded white american cheese 4 ounces shredded pepper jack cheese 2/3 cup half and half 1 (15-ounce) can diced tomatoes with green chiles, drained 2 cups chopped fresh spinach 1/2 cup chopped fresh cilantro heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. add diced onion and jalapeno, saute until tender. stir in white american cheese, pepper jack cheese, and half and half until melted and smooth. add drained tomatoes with green chiles, fresh spinach, and cilantro. stir well. transfer to a serving dish and serve with tortilla chips.
